unit: U0.1: There's a/an... / There are some...

sentences.en1: There's a clock on the wall.
sentences.en2: There's a clock on the wall.
sentences.vi: Có một cái đồng hồ trên tường.
sentences.formula: There's + a + N + on + the + N

sentences.en1: There's an open window.
sentences.en2: There's an open window.
sentences.vi: Có một cửa sổ đang mở.
sentences.formula: There's + an + adj + N

sentences.en1: There are some crayons on the floor.
sentences.en2: There are some crayons on the floor.
sentences.vi: Có một vài cây bút sáp màu trên sàn.
sentences.formula: There are + some + N(s) + on + the + N

sentences.en1: There are some books in the bookcase.
sentences.en2: There are some books in the bookcase.
sentences.vi: Có một vài quyển sách trong tủ sách.
sentences.formula: There are + some + N(s) + in + the + N

sentences.en1: Is there a chair? Yes, there is.
sentences.en2: Is there a chair? Yes, there is.
sentences.vi: Có một cái ghế không? Có, có.
sentences.formula: Is there + a + N?

sentences.en1: Are there any doors? No, there aren't.
sentences.en2: Are there any doors? No, there aren't.
sentences.vi: Có cánh cửa nào không? Không, không có.
sentences.formula: Are there + any + N(s)?

sentences.en1: Open your book, please.
sentences.en2: Open your book, please.
sentences.vi: Làm ơn mở sách của bạn ra.
sentences.formula: V + your + N

sentences.en1: Close the window.
sentences.en2: Close the window.
sentences.vi: Đóng cửa sổ lại.
sentences.formula: V + the + N

sentences.en1: Don't drop the pencils!
sentences.en2: Don't drop the pencils!
sentences.vi: Đừng làm rơi những cây bút chì!
sentences.formula: Don't + V + the + N(s)!

sentences.en1: Don't run in the classroom.
sentences.en2: Don't run in the classroom.
sentences.vi: Đừng chạy trong lớp học.
sentences.formula: Don't + V + in + the + N!

sentences.en1: Sit down and listen.
sentences.en2: Sit down and listen.
sentences.vi: Ngồi xuống và lắng nghe.
sentences.formula: V + and + V

unit: U1.1: What's the time? / It's ... o'clock.

sentences.en1: What's the time? It's seven o'clock.
sentences.en2: What's the time? It's seven o'clock.
sentences.vi: Mấy giờ rồi? Bây giờ là 7 giờ.
sentences.formula: What's the time? It's + số + o'clock.

sentences.en1: It's eight o'clock. Time for school.
sentences.en2: It's eight o'clock. Time for school.
sentences.vi: 8 giờ rồi. Đến giờ đi học rồi.
sentences.formula: It's + số + o'clock. Time for + N.

sentences.en1: What time is it? It's nine o'clock.
sentences.en2: What time is it? It's nine o'clock.
sentences.vi: Mấy giờ rồi? 9 giờ rồi.
sentences.formula: What time + is + it?

sentences.en1: Is it ten o'clock? Yes, it is.
sentences.en2: Is it ten o'clock? Yes, it is.
sentences.vi: Có phải là 10 giờ không? Đúng vậy.
sentences.formula: Is it + số + o'clock?

sentences.en1: He gets up at six o'clock.
sentences.en2: He gets up at six o'clock.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy thức dậy lúc 6 giờ.
sentences.formula: He/She + V(s/es) + at + số + o'clock.

sentences.en1: She gets dressed at half past seven.
sentences.en2: She gets dressed at half past seven.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy mặc quần áo lúc 7 giờ rưỡi.
sentences.formula: He/She + V(s/es) + at + time.

sentences.en1: He brushes his teeth every morning.
sentences.en2: He brushes his teeth every morning.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy đánh răng mỗi sáng.
sentences.formula: He/She + V(s/es) + his/her + N(s) + every morning.

sentences.en1: My mum has breakfast at home.
sentences.en2: My mum has breakfast at home.
sentences.vi: Mẹ tôi ăn sáng ở nhà.
sentences.formula: He/She + V(s/es) + N + at + place.

sentences.en1: Does she go to school by bus? Yes, she does.
sentences.en2: Does she go to school by bus? Yes, she does.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy có đi học bằng xe buýt không? Có, cô ấy có.
sentences.formula: Does + he/she + V + by + N?

sentences.en1: He doesn't play in the park in the evening.
sentences.en2: He doesn't play in the park in the evening.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy không chơi trong công viên vào buổi tối.
sentences.formula: He/She + doesn't + V + in + the + N.

sentences.en1: He likes zebras. They are beautiful.
sentences.en2: He likes zebras. They are beautiful.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy thích những con ngựa vằn. Chúng thật đẹp.
sentences.formula: He/She + likes + N(s).

sentences.en1: She doesn't like crocodiles. They are scary.
sentences.en2: She doesn't like crocodiles. They are scary.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy không thích cá sấu. Chúng thật đáng sợ.
sentences.formula: He/She + doesn't like + N(s).

sentences.en1: The monkey likes bananas.
sentences.en2: The monkey likes bananas.
sentences.vi: Con khỉ thích chuối.
sentences.formula: The + N + likes + N(s).

sentences.en1: My sister likes tigers.
sentences.en2: My sister likes tigers.
sentences.vi: Em gái tôi thích những con hổ.
sentences.formula: My + N + likes + N(s).

sentences.en1: Does the parrot like fruit? Yes, it does.
sentences.en2: Does the parrot like fruit? Yes, it does.
sentences.vi: Con vẹt có thích trái cây không? Có, nó thích.
sentences.formula: Does + the + N + like + N?

unit: U2.2: Does he/she like...? Yes/No questions.

sentences.en1: Does he like polar bears? Yes, he does.
sentences.en2: Does he like polar bears? Yes, he does.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy có thích gấu bắc cực không? Có, anh ấy thích.
sentences.formula: Does + he/she + like + N(s)?

sentences.en1: Does she like snakes? No, she doesn't.
sentences.en2: Does she like snakes? No, she doesn't.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy có thích rắn không? Không, cô ấy không thích.
sentences.formula: Does + he/she + like + N(s)?

sentences.en1: What animal does she like? She likes hippos.
sentences.en2: What animal does she like? She likes hippos.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy thích con vật nào? Cô ấy thích những con hà mã.
sentences.formula: What animal + does + he/she + like?

sentences.en1: Does the zookeeper like his job? Yes, he does.
sentences.en2: Does the zookeeper like his job? Yes, he does.
sentences.vi: Người trông sở thú có thích công việc của anh ấy không? Có, anh ấy thích.
sentences.formula: Does + the + N + like + his/her + N?

sentences.en1: Do you like monkeys? Yes, I do.
sentences.en2: Do you like monkeys? Yes, I do.
sentences.vi: Bạn có thích khỉ không? Có, tôi thích.
sentences.formula: Do + you + like + N(s)?

unit: U3.1: Has your town got a...? / Yes, it has. / No, it hasn't.

sentences.en1: Has your town got a cinema? Yes, it has.
sentences.en2: Has your town got a cinema? Yes, it has.
sentences.vi: Thị trấn của bạn có rạp chiếu phim không? Có, nó có.
sentences.formula: Has + your + town + got + a + N?

sentences.en1: Has it got a swimming pool? No, it hasn't.
sentences.en2: Has it got a swimming pool? No, it hasn't.
sentences.vi: Nó có có hồ bơi không? Không, nó không có.
sentences.formula: Has + it + got + a + N?

sentences.en1: Our town has got a big park.
sentences.en2: Our town has got a big park.
sentences.vi: Thị trấn của chúng tôi có một công viên lớn.
sentences.formula: Our + town + has got + a + adj + N.

sentences.en1: My street hasn't got a café.
sentences.en2: My street hasn't got a café.
sentences.vi: Đường phố của tôi không có quán cà phê.
sentences.formula: My + N + hasn't got + a + N.

sentences.en1: Has London got a zoo? Yes, it has.
sentences.en2: Has London got a zoo? Yes, it has.
sentences.vi: Luân Đôn có sở thú không? Có, nó có.
sentences.formula: Has + place + got + a + N?

unit: U3.2: Prepositions of place (next to, behind, between, in front of)

sentences.en1: The playground is next to the school.
sentences.en2: The playground is next to the school.
sentences.vi: Sân chơi ở bên cạnh trường học.
sentences.formula: The + N + is + next to + the + N.

sentences.en1: The bus stop is behind the hospital.
sentences.en2: The bus stop is behind the hospital.
sentences.vi: Trạm xe buýt ở phía sau bệnh viện.
sentences.formula: The + N + is + behind + the + N.

sentences.en1: The shop is between the café and the cinema.
sentences.en2: The shop is between the café and the cinema.
sentences.vi: Cửa hàng ở giữa quán cà phê và rạp chiếu phim.
sentences.formula: The + N + is + between + N + and + N.

sentences.en1: I am in front of the train station.
sentences.en2: I am in front of the train station.
sentences.vi: Tôi đang ở phía trước nhà ga.
sentences.formula: I + am + in front of + the + N.

sentences.en1: Where is the park? It's next to the river.
sentences.en2: Where is the park? It's next to the river.
sentences.vi: Công viên ở đâu? Nó ở cạnh con sông.
sentences.formula: Where + is + the + N? It's + next to + the + N.

unit: U4.1: Would you like a/an...? / Would you like some...?

sentences.en1: Would you like an apple? Yes, please.
sentences.en2: Would you like an apple? Yes, please.
sentences.vi: Bạn có muốn một quả táo không? Vâng, làm ơn.
sentences.formula: Would you like + a/an + N?

sentences.en1: Would you like a lemon? No, thank you.
sentences.en2: Would you like a lemon? No, thank you.
sentences.vi: Bạn có muốn một quả chanh không? Không, cảm ơn.
sentences.formula: Would you like + a/an + N?

sentences.en1: Would you like some bread? Yes, please.
sentences.en2: Would you like some bread? Yes, please.
sentences.vi: Bạn có muốn một ít bánh mì không? Vâng, làm ơn.
sentences.formula: Would you like + some + N?

sentences.en1: Would you like some watermelons? No, thank you.
sentences.en2: Would you like some watermelons? No, thank you.
sentences.vi: Bạn có muốn một ít dưa hấu không? Không, cảm ơn.
sentences.formula: Would you like + some + N(s)?

sentences.en1: I'd like some eggs, please.
sentences.en2: I'd like some eggs, please.
sentences.vi: Tôi muốn một ít trứng, làm ơn.
sentences.formula: I'd like + some + N(s), please.

unit: U4.2: Is there any...? / Are there any...? (Food)

sentences.en1: Is there any cheese? Yes, there is.
sentences.en2: Is there any cheese? Yes, there is.
sentences.vi: Có chút phô mai nào không? Có, có.
sentences.formula: Is there + any + N?

sentences.en1: Is there any milk? No, there isn't.
sentences.en2: Is there any milk? No, there isn't.
sentences.vi: Có chút sữa nào không? Không, không có.
sentences.formula: Is there + any + N?

sentences.en1: Are there any tomatoes? Yes, there are.
sentences.en2: Are there any tomatoes? Yes, there are.
sentences.vi: Có quả cà chua nào không? Có, có.
sentences.formula: Are there + any + N(s)?

sentences.en1: Are there any beans in the basket? No, there aren't.
sentences.en2: Are there any beans in the basket? No, there aren't.
sentences.vi: Có hạt đậu nào trong giỏ không? Không, không có.
sentences.formula: Are there + any + N(s) + in + the + N?

sentences.en1: There isn't any bread on the table.
sentences.en2: There isn't any bread on the table.
sentences.vi: Không có chút bánh mì nào trên bàn.
sentences.formula: There + isn't + any + N + on + the + N.

sentences.en1: This is my new bed.
sentences.en2: This is my new bed.
sentences.vi: Đây là cái giường mới của tôi.
sentences.formula: This + is + my + adj + N.

sentences.en1: That is your old wardrobe.
sentences.en2: That is your old wardrobe.
sentences.vi: Kia là cái tủ quần áo cũ của bạn.
sentences.formula: That + is + your + adj + N.

sentences.en1: These are my comics.
sentences.en2: These are my comics.
sentences.vi: Đây là những quyển truyện tranh của tôi.
sentences.formula: These + are + my + N(s).

sentences.en1: Those are your shoes under the chair.
sentences.en2: Those are your shoes under the chair.
sentences.vi: Kia là đôi giày của bạn dưới ghế.
sentences.formula: Those + are + your + N(s) + under + the + N.

sentences.en1: This mirror is big. That mirror is small.
sentences.en2: This mirror is big. That mirror is small.
sentences.vi: Cái gương này to. Cái gương kia nhỏ.
sentences.formula: This + N + is + adj. That + N + is + adj.

unit: U5.2: Whose ... is this? / Whose ... are these?

sentences.en1: Whose lamp is this? It's my lamp. / It's mine.
sentences.en2: Whose lamp is this? It's my lamp. / It's mine.
sentences.vi: Cái đèn ngủ này của ai? Nó là đèn của tôi.
sentences.formula: Whose + N + is + this? It's + my + N. / It's + mine.

sentences.en1: Whose T-shirt is that? It's his.
sentences.en2: Whose T-shirt is that? It's his.
sentences.vi: Cái áo phông kia của ai? Nó là áo của anh ấy.
sentences.formula: Whose + N + is + that? It's + his + N. / It's + his.

sentences.en1: Whose socks are these? They're hers.
sentences.en2: Whose socks are these? They're hers.
sentences.vi: Những đôi tất này của ai? Chúng là tất của cô ấy.
sentences.formula: Whose + N(s) + are + these? They're + her + N(s). / They're + hers.

sentences.en1: Whose toys are those? They're ours.
sentences.en2: Whose toys are those? They're ours.
sentences.vi: Những món đồ chơi kia của ai? Chúng là đồ chơi của chúng tôi.
sentences.formula: Whose + N(s) + are + those? They're + our + N(s). / They're + ours.

sentences.en1: Is this your rug? Yes, it's mine.
sentences.en2: Is this your rug? Yes, it's mine.
sentences.vi: Cái thảm này có phải của bạn không? Đúng, nó là của tôi.
sentences.formula: Is this + your + N? Yes, it's + mine.

unit: U6.1: I am / He is / She is + Adjective (Feelings)

sentences.en1: I am happy today.
sentences.en2: I am happy today.
sentences.vi: Hôm nay tôi vui.
sentences.formula: I + am + adj.

sentences.en1: He is angry because he lost his game.
sentences.en2: He is angry because he lost his game.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy tức giận vì thua trò chơi.
sentences.formula: He + is + adj + because + clause.

sentences.en1: She is tired. She wants to go to bed.
sentences.en2: She is tired. She wants to go to bed.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy mệt. Cô ấy muốn đi ngủ.
sentences.formula: She + is + adj. She + wants to + V.

sentences.en1: Are you excited about the holiday?
sentences.en2: Are you excited about the holiday?
sentences.vi: Bạn có hào hứng về kỳ nghỉ không? Có, tôi có.
sentences.formula: Are + you + adj + about + the + N?

sentences.en1: Is he scared of spiders? Yes, he is.
sentences.en2: Is he scared of spiders? Yes, he is.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy có sợ nhện không? Có, anh ấy sợ.
sentences.formula: Is + he/she + adj + of + N(s)?

sentences.en1: Our house is blue.
sentences.en2: Our house is blue.
sentences.vi: Nhà của chúng tôi màu xanh dương.
sentences.formula: Our + N + is + adj.

sentences.en1: Their car is red and fast.
sentences.en2: Their car is red and fast.
sentences.vi: Xe ô tô của họ màu đỏ và nhanh.
sentences.formula: Their + N + is + adj + and + adj.

sentences.en1: This is our classroom.
sentences.en2: This is our classroom.
sentences.vi: Đây là lớp học của chúng tôi.
sentences.formula: This + is + our + N.

sentences.en1: Those are their bikes outside.
sentences.en2: Those are their bikes outside.
sentences.vi: Kia là những chiếc xe đạp của họ ở bên ngoài.
sentences.formula: Those + are + their + N(s) + outside.

sentences.en1: Our teacher is very kind.
sentences.en2: Our teacher is very kind.
sentences.vi: Giáo viên của chúng tôi rất tử tế.
sentences.formula: Our + N + is + very + adj.

unit: U7.1: I'd like to + Verb (want to)

sentences.en1: I'd like to fly in a helicopter.
sentences.en2: I'd like to fly in a helicopter.
sentences.vi: Tôi muốn bay trong một chiếc máy bay trực thăng.
sentences.formula: I'd like to + V + in + a + N.

sentences.en1: He'd like to drive a big lorry.
sentences.en2: He'd like to drive a big lorry.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy muốn lái một chiếc xe tải lớn.
sentences.formula: He'd like to + V + a + adj + N.

sentences.en1: She'd like to sail a boat across the ocean.
sentences.en2: She'd like to sail a boat across the ocean.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy muốn đi thuyền buồm vượt qua đại dương.
sentences.formula: She'd like to + V + a + N + across + the + N.

sentences.en1: Would you like to ride a motorbike? Yes, I would.
sentences.en2: Would you like to ride a motorbike? Yes, I would.
sentences.vi: Bạn có muốn lái xe máy không? Có, tôi muốn.
sentences.formula: Would you like to + V + a + N?

sentences.en1: They'd like to go by taxi.
sentences.en2: They'd like to go by taxi.
sentences.vi: Họ muốn đi bằng taxi.
sentences.formula: They'd like to + V + by + N.

unit: U7.2: Present Continuous (What are you doing?)

sentences.en1: What are you doing? I'm painting a picture.
sentences.en2: What are you doing? I'm painting a picture.
sentences.vi: Bạn đang làm gì vậy? Tôi đang vẽ một bức tranh.
sentences.formula: What + are + you + V-ing? I'm + V-ing + a + N.

sentences.en1: He is riding his scooter to the park.
sentences.en2: He is riding his scooter to the park.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy đang đi xe tay ga đến công viên.
sentences.formula: He/She + is + V-ing + his/her + N + to + the + N.

sentences.en1: She is not driving. She is flying a plane!
sentences.en2: She is not driving. She is flying a plane!
sentences.vi: Cô ấy không đang lái xe. Cô ấy đang lái máy bay!
sentences.formula: He/She + is + not + V-ing. He/She + is + V-ing + a + N!

sentences.en1: Are they taking the bus? No, they aren't.
sentences.en2: Are they taking the bus? No, they aren't.
sentences.vi: Họ đang bắt xe buýt phải không? Không, họ không.
sentences.formula: Are + they + V-ing + the + N? No, they + are + V-ing.

sentences.en1: Look! That man is skating on a skateboard.
sentences.en2: Look! That man is skating on a skateboard.
sentences.vi: Nhìn kìa! Người đàn ông kia đang trượt ván.
sentences.formula: Look! That + N + is + V-ing + on + a + N.

unit: U8.1: V-ing as Subject (Swimming is fun.)

sentences.en1: Swimming is my favourite sport.
sentences.en2: Swimming is my favourite sport.
sentences.vi: Bơi lội là môn thể thao yêu thích của tôi.
sentences.formula: V-ing + is + my + favourite + N.

sentences.en1: Playing basketball is fun and exciting.
sentences.en2: Playing basketball is fun and exciting.
sentences.vi: Chơi bóng rổ thì vui và hào hứng.
sentences.formula: V-ing + N + is + adj + and + adj.

sentences.en1: Running is very good for you.
sentences.en2: Running is very good for you.
sentences.vi: Chạy bộ rất tốt cho bạn.
sentences.formula: V-ing + is + very + good + for + you.

sentences.en1: Is playing tennis difficult? Yes, it is.
sentences.en2: Is playing tennis difficult? Yes, it is.
sentences.vi: Chơi quần vợt có khó không? Có, nó khó.
sentences.formula: Is + V-ing + N + adj?

sentences.en1: Watching football is boring. I like playing it.
sentences.en2: Watching football is boring. I like playing it.
sentences.vi: Xem bóng đá thì chán. Tôi thích chơi nó.
sentences.formula: V-ing + N + is + adj. I + like + V-ing + it.

unit: U8.2: What sport do you like doing? / So do I. / I don't.

sentences.en1: What sport do you like doing? I like playing badminton.
sentences.en2: What sport do you like doing? I like playing badminton.
sentences.vi: Bạn thích chơi môn thể thao nào? Tôi thích chơi cầu lông.
sentences.formula: What sport + do + you + like + V-ing? I like + V-ing + N.

sentences.en1: You like playing volleyball. So do I!
sentences.en2: I like playing volleyball. So do I!
sentences.vi: Bạn thích chơi bóng chuyền. Tôi cũng vậy!
sentences.formula: You like + V-ing + N. So do I!

sentences.en1: He likes doing athletics. So do I!
sentences.en2: He likes doing athletics. So do I!
sentences.vi: Anh ấy thích tập điền kinh. Tôi cũng vậy!
sentences.formula: He/She + likes + V-ing + N.

sentences.en1: You don't like playing hockey. I don't like it either.
sentences.en2: You don't like playing hockey. I don't like it either.
sentences.vi: Bạn không thích chơi khúc côn cầu. Tôi cũng không thích nó.
sentences.formula: You don't like + V-ing + N. I don't like + it + either.

sentences.en1: Do you like playing table tennis? Yes, I do. It's easy.
sentences.en2: Do you like playing table tennis? Yes, I do. It's easy.
sentences.vi: Bạn có thích chơi bóng bàn không? Có, tôi thích. Nó dễ.
sentences.formula: Do + you + like + V-ing + N? Yes, I do. It's + adj.

unit: U9.1: Can I / we ...? (Asking for permission)

sentences.en1: Can I read your comic? Yes, you can.
sentences.en2: Can I read your comic? Yes, you can.
sentences.vi: Tôi có thể đọc truyện tranh của bạn không? Được, bạn có thể.
sentences.formula: Can + I + V + your + N?

sentences.en1: Can we go camping this weekend? Of course!
sentences.en2: Can we go camping this weekend? Of course!
sentences.vi: Chúng tôi có thể đi cắm trại vào cuối tuần này không? Tất nhiên rồi!
sentences.formula: Can + we + V + N + this + weekend?

sentences.en1: Can I help in the garden, Dad? Yes, please.
sentences.en2: Can I help in the garden, Dad? Yes, please.
sentences.vi: Con có thể giúp việc trong vườn được không, Bố? Được, con giúp đi.
sentences.formula: Can + I + V + in + the + N?

sentences.en1: Can we build a tree house here? No, you can't. It's dangerous.
sentences.en2: Can we build a tree house here? No, you can't. It's dangerous.
sentences.vi: Chúng con có thể xây nhà trên cây ở đây không? Không, các con không thể. Nguy hiểm lắm.
sentences.formula: Can + we + V + a + N + here? No, you + can't.

sentences.en1: Can I take a riding lesson? Yes, you can. It's fun.
sentences.en2: Can I take a riding lesson? Yes, you can. It's fun.
sentences.vi: Con có thể học một buổi cưỡi ngựa không? Được, con có thể. Nó rất vui.
sentences.formula: Can + I + V + a + N + lesson?

unit: U9.2: Revision Questions (Does...?, Has...?, Where...?, Whose...?)

sentences.en1: Does your sister like hiking? Yes, she does.
sentences.en2: Does your sister like hiking? Yes, she does.
sentences.vi: Chị gái bạn có thích đi bộ đường dài không? Có, chị ấy thích.
sentences.formula: Does + your + N + like + V-ing?

sentences.en1: Has your town got a library? Yes, it has.
sentences.en2: Has your town got a library? Yes, it has.
sentences.vi: Thị trấn của bạn có thư viện không? Có, nó có.
sentences.formula: Has + your + town + got + a + N?

sentences.en1: Where are my cousins? They are in the living room.
sentences.en2: Where are my cousins? They are in the living room.
sentences.vi: Những người anh em họ của tôi đâu? Họ ở trong phòng khách.
sentences.formula: Where + are + my + N(s)? They + are + in + the + N.

sentences.en1: Whose swimming goggles are these? They're his.
sentences.en2: Whose swimming goggles are these? They're his.
sentences.vi: Cái kính bơi này của ai? Chúng là của anh ấy.
sentences.formula: Whose + N(s) + are + these? They're + his/hers.

sentences.en1: What time does the holiday start? It starts on Saturday.
sentences.en2: What time does the holiday start? It starts on Saturday.
sentences.vi: Kỳ nghỉ bắt đầu lúc mấy giờ? Nó bắt đầu vào thứ Bảy.
sentences.formula: What time + does + the + N + V?

unit: U0.1: be good at + V-ing / not good at + V-ing

sentences.en1: I am good at exploring.
sentences.en2: I am good at exploring.
sentences.vi: Tôi giỏi khám phá.
sentences.formula: I + am + good at + V-ing

sentences.en1: She is good at counting numbers.
sentences.en2: She is good at counting numbers.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy giỏi đếm số.
sentences.formula: He/She + is + good at + V-ing

sentences.en1: He is not good at finding the cellar.
sentences.en2: He is not good at finding the cellar.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy không giỏi tìm hầm.
sentences.formula: He/She + is + not good at + V-ing

sentences.en1: Are you good at exploring upstairs?
sentences.en2: Are you good at exploring upstairs?
sentences.vi: Bạn có giỏi khám phá tầng trên không?
sentences.formula: Are + you + good at + V-ing + N?

sentences.en1: My uncle is good at finding lost treasure.
sentences.en2: My uncle is good at finding lost treasure.
sentences.vi: Chú tôi giỏi tìm kho báu thất lạc.
sentences.formula: My + N + is + good at + V-ing + N

sentences.en1: This is Tom's adventure map.
sentences.en2: This is Tom's adventure map.
sentences.vi: Đây là bản đồ phiêu lưu của Tom.
sentences.formula: This + is + name's + N

sentences.en1: That is the explorer's secret castle.
sentences.en2: That is the explorer's secret castle.
sentences.vi: Kia là lâu đài bí mật của nhà thám hiểm.
sentences.formula: That + is + the + N's + N

sentences.en1: Is this Mike's museum?
sentences.en2: Is this Mike's museum?
sentences.vi: Đây có phải là bảo tàng của Mike không?
sentences.formula: Is + this + name's + N?

sentences.en1: Whose cellar is this? It's Emma's.
sentences.en2: Whose cellar is this? It's Emma's.
sentences.vi: Hầm này của ai? Nó là của Emma.
sentences.formula: Whose + N + is + this? It's + name's.

sentences.en1: The castle's treasure is only for explorers.
sentences.en2: The castle's treasure is only for explorers.
sentences.vi: Kho báu của lâu đài chỉ dành cho các nhà thám hiểm.
sentences.formula: The + N's + N + is + only for + N(s)

unit: U1.1: Like / Love / Don't like + V-ing

sentences.en1: I love studying Maths.
sentences.en2: I love studying Maths.
sentences.vi: Tôi yêu thích học Toán.
sentences.formula: I + love + V-ing + N

sentences.en1: She likes drawing in Art class.
sentences.en2: She likes drawing in Art class.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy thích vẽ trong giờ Mỹ thuật.
sentences.formula: He/She + likes + V-ing + in + N

sentences.en1: He doesn't like reading History books.
sentences.en2: He doesn't like reading History books.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy không thích đọc sách Lịch sử.
sentences.formula: He/She + doesn't + like + V-ing + N(s)

sentences.en1: Do you like singing in Music?
sentences.en2: Do you like singing in Music?
sentences.vi: Bạn có thích hát trong giờ Âm nhạc không?
sentences.formula: Do + you + like + V-ing + in + N?

sentences.en1: We love playing games in I.T.
sentences.en2: We love playing games in I.T.
sentences.vi: Chúng tôi yêu thích chơi trò chơi trong giờ Tin học.
sentences.formula: We/They + love + V-ing + N(s) + in + N

sentences.en1: You have to wear a uniform for P.E.
sentences.en2: You have to wear a uniform for P.E.
sentences.vi: Bạn phải mặc đồng phục cho giờ Thể dục.
sentences.formula: You + have to + V + a + N + for + N

sentences.en1: She has to keep her Science book dark.
sentences.en2: She has to keep her Science book dark.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy phải giữ cuốn sách Khoa học của mình ở nơi tối.
sentences.formula: He/She + has to + V + his/her + N + adj

sentences.en1: Do we have to follow the teacher yet?
sentences.en2: Do we have to follow the teacher yet?
sentences.vi: Chúng ta đã phải đi theo giáo viên chưa?
sentences.formula: Do + we + have to + V + the + N + yet?

sentences.en1: I have to do my English homework.
sentences.en2: I have to do my English homework.
sentences.vi: Tôi phải làm bài tập Tiếng Anh.
sentences.formula: I + have to + V + my + N

sentences.en1: No way! I don't have to go to Geography.
sentences.en2: No way! I don't have to go to Geography.
sentences.vi: Không đời nào! Tôi không phải đi học Địa lý.
sentences.formula: I + don't + have to + V + to + N

unit: U2.1: Is/Are there any...? There is some... / There isn't any...

sentences.en1: Is there any apple juice?
sentences.en2: Is there any apple juice?
sentences.vi: Có chút nước ép táo nào không?
sentences.formula: Is + there + any + N?

sentences.en1: There is some cheese on the rolls.
sentences.en2: There is some cheese on the rolls.
sentences.vi: Có một ít phô mai trên những cái bánh cuộn.
sentences.formula: There + is + some + N + on + the + N(s)

sentences.en1: There isn't any soup in the hut.
sentences.en2: There isn't any soup in the hut.
sentences.vi: Không có chút súp nào trong túp lều.
sentences.formula: There + isn't + any + N + in + the + N

sentences.en1: Are there any vegetables? Yes, there are.
sentences.en2: Are there any vegetables? Yes, there are.
sentences.vi: Có chút rau củ nào không? Có, có.
sentences.formula: Are + there + any + N(s)?

sentences.en1: There is some water at the top of the waterfall.
sentences.en2: There is some water at the top of the waterfall.
sentences.vi: Có một ít nước ở đỉnh thác.
sentences.formula: There + is + some + N + at + the + N + of + the + N

unit: U2.2: Suggestions: Shall we...? / How about...?

sentences.en1: Shall we make some lemonade?
sentences.en2: Shall we make some lemonade?
sentences.vi: Chúng ta làm một ít nước chanh nhé?
sentences.formula: Shall + we + V + some + N?

sentences.en1: How about eating a golden apple?
sentences.en2: How about eating a golden apple?
sentences.vi: Còn việc ăn một quả táo vàng thì sao?
sentences.formula: How about + V-ing + a/an + adj + N?

sentences.en1: Shall we go to the doctor? I feel ill.
sentences.en2: Shall we go to the doctor? I feel ill.
sentences.vi: Chúng ta đi gặp bác sĩ nhé? Tôi cảm thấy ốm.
sentences.formula: Shall + we + V + to + the + N?

sentences.en1: How about having a salad for lunch?
sentences.en2: How about having a salad for lunch?
sentences.vi: Còn việc ăn sa-lát cho bữa trưa thì sao?
sentences.formula: How about + V-ing + a + N + for + N?

sentences.en1: Shall we take some medicine?
sentences.en2: Shall we take some medicine?
sentences.vi: Chúng ta uống một ít thuốc nhé?
sentences.formula: Shall + we + V + some + N?

unit: U3.1: Telling the time: It's quarter past/to..., half past...

sentences.en1: It's quarter past seven. Time to wash up.
sentences.en2: It's quarter past seven. Time to wash up.
sentences.vi: Bây giờ là bảy giờ mười lăm. Đến giờ rửa bát.
sentences.formula: It's + quarter past + số. Time to + V.

sentences.en1: It's half past eight. I have to sweep the floor.
sentences.en2: It's half past eight. I have to sweep the floor.
sentences.vi: Bây giờ là tám giờ rưỡi. Tôi phải quét sàn.
sentences.formula: It's + half past + số. I + have to + V + the + N.

sentences.en1: It's quarter to nine. Let's cook dinner.
sentences.en2: It's quarter to nine. Let's cook dinner.
sentences.vi: Bây giờ là chín giờ kém mười lăm. Chúng ta hãy nấu bữa tối.
sentences.formula: It's + quarter to + số. Let's + V + N.

sentences.en1: Is it half past six? Time to feed the dog.
sentences.en2: Is it half past six? Time to feed the dog.
sentences.vi: Có phải là sáu giờ rưỡi không? Đến giờ cho chó ăn.
sentences.formula: Is it + half past + số? Time to + V + the + N.

sentences.en1: The moon is beautiful at night. It's quarter past ten.
sentences.en2: The moon is beautiful at night. It's quarter past ten.
sentences.vi: Mặt trăng thật đẹp vào ban đêm. Bây giờ là mười giờ mười lăm.
sentences.formula: The + N + is + adj + at night. It's + quarter past + số.

unit: U3.2: Adverbs of frequency: always, usually, sometimes, never

sentences.en1: I always tidy up my room.
sentences.en2: I always tidy up my room.
sentences.vi: Tôi luôn luôn dọn dẹp phòng của mình.
sentences.formula: I + always + V + my + N.

sentences.en1: She usually dries the dishes.
sentences.en2: She usually dries the dishes.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy thường xuyên lau khô bát đĩa.
sentences.formula: He/She + usually + V(s/es) + the + N(s).

sentences.en1: He sometimes takes the dog for a walk.
sentences.en2: He sometimes takes the dog for a walk.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy thỉnh thoảng dắt chó đi dạo.
sentences.formula: He/She + sometimes + V(s/es) + the + N + for + a + N.

sentences.en1: We never do the shopping on Monday.
sentences.en2: We never do the shopping on Monday.
sentences.vi: Chúng tôi không bao giờ đi mua sắm vào thứ Hai.
sentences.formula: We/They + never + V + the + N + on + day.

sentences.en1: My dad is a pilot. He is always busy.
sentences.en2: My dad is a pilot. He is always busy.
sentences.vi: Bố tôi là phi công. Ông ấy luôn luôn bận rộn.
sentences.formula: My + N + is + a + N. He + is + always + adj.

unit: U4.1: Prepositions of place: opposite, near, above, below

sentences.en1: The bank is opposite the library.
sentences.en2: The bank is opposite the library.
sentences.vi: Ngân hàng đối diện thư viện.
sentences.formula: The + N + is + opposite + the + N.

sentences.en1: The funfair is near the market square.
sentences.en2: The funfair is near the market square.
sentences.vi: Hội chợ vui chơi gần quảng trường chợ.
sentences.formula: The + N + is + near + the + N.

sentences.en1: The clock is above the door.
sentences.en2: The clock is above the door.
sentences.vi: Đồng hồ ở phía trên cửa.
sentences.formula: The + N + is + above + the + N.

sentences.en1: The car park is below the supermarket.
sentences.en2: The car park is below the supermarket.
sentences.vi: Bãi đỗ xe ở phía dưới siêu thị.
sentences.formula: The + N + is + below + the + N.

sentences.en1: The sports centre is near the bus station.
sentences.en2: The sports centre is near the bus station.
sentences.vi: Trung tâm thể thao gần bến xe buýt.
sentences.formula: The + N + is + near + the + N.

unit: U4.2: Be going to + place + to + V-inf

sentences.en1: I'm going to the tower to see the view.
sentences.en2: I'm going to the tower to see the view.
sentences.vi: Tôi sẽ đi đến tháp để ngắm cảnh.
sentences.formula: I'm + going to + the + N + to + V + the + N.

sentences.en1: She is going to the bank to get money.
sentences.en2: She is going to the bank to get money.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy sẽ đi đến ngân hàng để lấy tiền.
sentences.formula: He/She + is + going to + the + N + to + V + N.

sentences.en1: Are you going to the funfair to ride the Pirate Ship?
sentences.en2: Are you going to the funfair to ride the Pirate Ship?
sentences.vi: Bạn có định đi đến hội chợ để chơi tàu cướp biển không?
sentences.formula: Are + you + going to + the + N + to + V + the + N?

sentences.en1: We are going to the wrong place!
sentences.en2: We are going to the wrong place!
sentences.vi: Chúng ta đang đi nhầm chỗ rồi!
sentences.formula: We + are + going to + the + adj + place!

sentences.en1: He is going to the map to find the way.
sentences.en2: He is going to the map to find the way.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy sẽ đi đến tấm bản đồ để tìm đường.
sentences.formula: He + is + going to + the + N + to + V + the + N.

unit: U5.1: Past simple of "be": was/were, wasn't/weren't

sentences.en1: I was in the sea yesterday.
sentences.en2: I was in the sea yesterday.
sentences.vi: Tôi đã ở trong biển ngày hôm qua.
sentences.formula: I + was + in + the + N + time.

sentences.en1: The dolphin was beautiful.
sentences.en2: The dolphin was beautiful.
sentences.vi: Con cá heo đã rất đẹp.
sentences.formula: The + N + was + adj.

sentences.en1: We were not scared of the octopus.
sentences.en2: We were not scared of the octopus.
sentences.vi: Chúng tôi đã không sợ con bạch tuộc.
sentences.formula: We/They + were + not + adj + of + the + N.

sentences.en1: Were you on the boat? Yes, I was.
sentences.en2: Were you on the boat? Yes, I was.
sentences.vi: Bạn đã ở trên thuyền phải không? Đúng vậy.
sentences.formula: Were + you + on + the + N?

sentences.en1: The seahorse wasn't in the cage.
sentences.en2: The seahorse wasn't in the cage.
sentences.vi: Con cá ngựa đã không ở trong lồng.
sentences.formula: The + N + wasn't + in + the + N.

unit: U5.2: Past questions with "be": Were you...? Was he...?

sentences.en1: Was the turtle giant? No, it wasn't.
sentences.en2: Was the turtle giant? No, it wasn't.
sentences.vi: Con rùa biển có khổng lồ không? Không, nó không.
sentences.formula: Was + the + N + adj?

sentences.en1: Were you stuck in a trap?
sentences.en2: Were you stuck in a trap?
sentences.vi: Bạn có bị kẹt trong một cái bẫy không?
sentences.formula: Were + you + adj + in + a + N?

sentences.en1: Was she helpful? Yes, she was.
sentences.en2: Was she helpful? Yes, she was.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy có hay giúp đỡ không? Có, cô ấy có.
sentences.formula: Was + he/she + adj?

sentences.en1: Were the starfish on the shell?
sentences.en2: Were the starfish on the shell?
sentences.vi: Những con sao biển có ở trên vỏ sò không?
sentences.formula: Were + the + N(s) + on + the + N?

sentences.en1: Was it the fourth seal you saw?
sentences.en2: Was it the fourth seal you saw?
sentences.vi: Có phải đó là con hải cẩu thứ tư bạn nhìn thấy không?
sentences.formula: Was + it + the + số thứ tự + N + you + V?

sentences.en1: The tablet is smaller than the laptop.
sentences.en2: The tablet is smaller than the laptop.
sentences.vi: Máy tính bảng nhỏ hơn máy tính xách tay. 📱💻
sentences.formula: The + N + is + adj-er + than + the + N.

sentences.en1: My torch is brighter than your torch.
sentences.en2: My torch is brighter than your torch.
sentences.vi: Đèn pin của tôi sáng hơn đèn pin của bạn. 🔦✨
sentences.formula: My + N + is + adj-er + than + your + N.

sentences.en1: Is the games console bigger than the walkie-talkie?
sentences.en2: Is the games console bigger than the walkie-talkie?
sentences.vi: Máy chơi game có to hơn bộ đàm không? 🎮📻
sentences.formula: Is + the + N + adj-er + than + the + N?

sentences.en1: This mobile phone is newer than that one.
sentences.en2: This mobile phone is newer than that one.
sentences.vi: Chiếc điện thoại di động này mới hơn chiếc kia. 📱🆕➡️📱
sentences.formula: This + N + is + adj-er + than + that + one.

sentences.en1: The lift is slower than the stairs.
sentences.en2: The lift is slower than the stairs.
sentences.vi: Thang máy chậm hơn cầu thang. 🛗🐌🪜
sentences.formula: The + N + is + adj-er + than + the + N(s).

sentences.en1: This is the biggest electric fan.
sentences.en2: This is the biggest electric fan.
sentences.vi: Đây là cái quạt điện to nhất. 💨🌀
sentences.formula: This + is + the + adj-est + N.

sentences.en1: That is the most fabulous tablet.
sentences.en2: That is the most fabulous tablet.
sentences.vi: Kia là chiếc máy tính bảng tuyệt vời nhất. 📱🌟
sentences.formula: That + is + the + most + adj + N.

sentences.en1: He has the smallest mobile phone.
sentences.en2: He has the smallest mobile phone.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy có chiếc điện thoại di động nhỏ nhất. 👦📱
sentences.formula: He/She + has + the + adj-est + N.

sentences.en1: Is this the newest games console?
sentences.en2: Is this the newest games console?
sentences.vi: Đây có phải là máy chơi game mới nhất không? 🎮🆕❓
sentences.formula: Is + this + the + adj-est + N?

sentences.en1: Our school has got the most expensive laptop.
sentences.en2: Our school has got the most expensive laptop.
sentences.vi: Trường chúng tôi có chiếc máy tính xách tay đắt nhất. 🏫💻💰
sentences.formula: Our + N + has got + the + most + adj + N.

unit: U7.1: Past simple regular verbs: V-ed

sentences.en1: The nurse helped the doctor.
sentences.en2: The nurse helped the doctor.
sentences.vi: Y tá đã giúp đỡ bác sĩ. 👩⚕️🤝👨⚕️
sentences.formula: The + N + V-ed + the + N.

sentences.en1: I coughed all night.
sentences.en2: I coughed all night.
sentences.vi: Tôi đã ho cả đêm. 😷🌙
sentences.formula: I + V-ed + all night.

sentences.en1: He cleaned the hospital room quietly.
sentences.en2: He cleaned the hospital room quietly.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy đã dọn phòng bệnh viện một cách yên lặng. 🧹🏥🤫
sentences.formula: He/She + V-ed + the + N + adv.

sentences.en1: We talked about the headache.
sentences.en2: We talked about the headache.
sentences.vi: Chúng tôi đã nói về chứng đau đầu. 👥🗣️🤕
sentences.formula: We/They + V-ed + about + the + N.

sentences.en1: The boy played and shouted.
sentences.en2: The boy played and shouted.
sentences.vi: Cậu bé đã chơi và la hét. 👦🎉🗣️
sentences.formula: The + N + V-ed + and + V-ed.

sentences.en1: I woke up early.
sentences.en2: I woke up early.
sentences.vi: Tôi đã thức dậy sớm. ⏰☀️
sentences.formula: I + V2 (irregular) + adv.

sentences.en1: She felt terrible yesterday.
sentences.en2: She felt terrible yesterday.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy đã cảm thấy khủng khiếp ngày hôm qua. 😔📅
sentences.formula: He/She + V2 (irregular) + adj + time.

sentences.en1: He had a cold last week.
sentences.en2: He had a cold last week.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy đã bị cảm lạnh tuần trước. 🤒🗓️
sentences.formula: He/She + V2 (irregular) + a + N + time.

sentences.en1: We went to see the dentist.
sentences.en2: We went to see the dentist.
sentences.vi: Chúng tôi đã đi gặp nha sĩ. 👥🦷
sentences.formula: We/They + V2 (irregular) + to + V + the + N.

sentences.en1: The doctor gave me medicine.
sentences.en2: The doctor gave me medicine.
sentences.vi: Bác sĩ đã đưa cho tôi thuốc. 👨⚕️💊
sentences.formula: The + N + V2 (irregular) + me + N.

unit: U8.1: Past simple negative: didn't + V-inf

sentences.en1: I didn't go to Mexico.
sentences.en2: I didn't go to Mexico.
sentences.vi: Tôi đã không đi đến Mê-hi-cô. 🇲🇽❌
sentences.formula: I + didn't + V + to + place.

sentences.en1: She didn't visit the pyramids in Egypt.
sentences.en2: She didn't visit the pyramids in Egypt.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy đã không thăm các kim tự tháp ở Ai Cập. 🗿🇪🇬❌
sentences.formula: He/She + didn't + V + the + N(s) + in + place.

sentences.en1: We didn't see the volcano.
sentences.en2: We didn't see the volcano.
sentences.vi: Chúng tôi đã không nhìn thấy núi lửa. 🌋👀❌
sentences.formula: We/They + didn't + V + the + N.

sentences.en1: He didn't travel to South America.
sentences.en2: He didn't travel to South America.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy đã không du lịch đến Nam Mỹ. 🌎✈️❌
sentences.formula: He/She + didn't + V + to + place.

sentences.en1: They didn't sail to the harbour.
sentences.en2: They didn't sail to the harbour.
sentences.vi: Họ đã không đi thuyền đến bến cảng. ⛵⚓❌
sentences.formula: They + didn't + V + to + the + N.

unit: U8.2: Past simple questions: Did you...? When did you...?

sentences.en1: Did you visit Spain?
sentences.en2: Did you visit Spain?
sentences.vi: Bạn đã đến thăm Tây Ban Nha phải không? 🇪🇸❓
sentences.formula: Did + you + V + place?

sentences.en1: When did you go to China?
sentences.en2: When did you go to China?
sentences.vi: Bạn đã đi đến Trung Quốc khi nào? 🇨🇳🗓️❓
sentences.formula: When + did + you + V + to + place?

sentences.en1: Did she see the canyon?
sentences.en2: Did she see the canyon?
sentences.vi: Cô ấy đã nhìn thấy hẻm núi phải không? 🏞️👀❓
sentences.formula: Did + he/she + V + the + N?

sentences.en1: What did you eat in Turkey?
sentences.en2: What did you eat in Turkey?
sentences.vi: Bạn đã ăn gì ở Thổ Nhĩ Kỳ? 🇹🇷🍽️❓
sentences.formula: What + did + you + V + in + place?

sentences.en1: Did they like Australia?
sentences.en2: Did they like Australia?
sentences.vi: Họ có thích nước Úc không? 🇦🇺👍❓
sentences.formula: Did + they + V + place?

unit: U9.1: Be going to (future): Be going to + V-inf

sentences.en1: It's going to rain. Take your umbrella.
sentences.en2: It's going to rain. Take your umbrella.
sentences.vi: Trời sắp mưa. Hãy mang ô của bạn đi. 🌧️☂️
sentences.formula: It's + going to + V.

sentences.en1: We are going to visit the seaside.
sentences.en2: We are going to visit the seaside.
sentences.vi: Chúng tôi sẽ đi thăm bờ biển. 🌊🏖️
sentences.formula: We + are + going to + V + the + N.

sentences.en1: Is he going to wear his raincoat?
sentences.en2: Is he going to wear his raincoat?
sentences.vi: Anh ấy có định mặc áo mưa của mình không? 🧥❓
sentences.formula: Is + he/she + going to + V + his/her + N?

sentences.en1: They are not going to go because of the fog.
sentences.en2: They are not going to go because of the fog.
sentences.vi: Họ sẽ không đi vì sương mù. 🌫️❌
sentences.formula: They + are + not + going to + V + because of + the + N.

sentences.en1: I am going to draw a picture of the steam train.
sentences.en2: I am going to draw a picture of the steam train.
sentences.vi: Tôi sẽ vẽ một bức tranh về tàu hơi nước. 🚂🎨
sentences.formula: I + am + going to + V + a + N + of + the + N.

unit: U9.2: Future questions: Are you going to...? What are you going to do?

sentences.en1: Are you going to pack your boots?
sentences.en2: Are you going to pack your boots?
sentences.vi: Bạn có định đóng gói đôi ủng của bạn không? 👢🎒❓
sentences.formula: Are + you + going to + V + your + N(s)?

sentences.en1: What are you going to do in the thunderstorm?
sentences.en2: What are you going to do in the thunderstorm?
sentences.vi: Bạn sẽ làm gì trong cơn bão sấm sét? ⛈️❓
sentences.formula: What + are + you + going to + do + in + the + N?

sentences.en1: Is she going to buy a new basket?
sentences.en2: Is she going to buy a new basket?
sentences.vi: Cô ấy có định mua một cái giỏ mới không? 🧺🆕❓
sentences.formula: Is + he/she + going to + V + a/an + adj + N?

sentences.en1: Where are they going to put the cart?
sentences.en2: Where are they going to put the cart?
sentences.vi: Họ sẽ để cái xe đẩy ở đâu? 🛒📍❓
sentences.formula: Where + are + they + going to + V + the + N?

sentences.en1: Are we going to see so much lightning?
sentences.en2: Are we going to see so much lightning?
sentences.vi: Chúng ta sẽ nhìn thấy rất nhiều tia chớp phải không? ⚡👀❓
sentences.formula: Are + we + going to + V + so much + N?

sentences.en1: Do you like the big wheel?
sentences.en2: Do you like the big wheel?
sentences.vi: Bạn có thích vòng quay khổng lồ không?
sentences.formula: Do + you + like + the + N?

sentences.en1: Does Lucy like the dodgem cars?
sentences.en2: Does Lucy like the dodgem cars?
sentences.vi: Lucy có thích xe điện đụng không?
sentences.formula: Does + name + like + the + N(s)?

sentences.en1: Where do you live?
sentences.en2: Where do you live?
sentences.vi: Bạn sống ở đâu?
sentences.formula: Where + do + you + live?

sentences.en1: Do you like reading comics?
sentences.en2: Do you like reading comics?
sentences.vi: Bạn có thích đọc truyện tranh không?
sentences.formula: Do + you + like + V-ing + N(s)?

sentences.en1: Does Ben like the rollercoaster?
sentences.en2: Does Ben like the rollercoaster?
sentences.vi: Ben có thích tàu lượn siêu tốc không?
sentences.formula: Does + name + like + the + N?

unit: U0.2: Past simple questions (What did...? / Did...?)

sentences.en1: What did you do at the weekend?
sentences.en2: What did you do at the weekend?
sentences.vi: Bạn đã làm gì vào cuối tuần?
sentences.formula: What + did + you + do + at + the + weekend?

sentences.en1: Did you find the treasure?
sentences.en2: Did you find the treasure?
sentences.vi: Bạn đã tìm thấy kho báu chưa?
sentences.formula: Did + you + V + the + N?

sentences.en1: Did you explore the museum?
sentences.en2: Did you explore the museum?
sentences.vi: Bạn đã khám phá bảo tàng chưa?
sentences.formula: Did + you + V + the + N?

sentences.en1: What did the mayor say?
sentences.en2: What did the mayor say?
sentences.vi: Thị trưởng đã nói gì?
sentences.formula: What + did + the + N + V?

sentences.en1: Did you take a photo with the band?
sentences.en2: Did you take a photo with the band?
sentences.vi: Bạn đã chụp ảnh với ban nhạc chưa?
sentences.formula: Did + you + V + a + N + with + the + N?

sentences.en1: I must wear a helmet.
sentences.en2: I must wear a helmet.
sentences.vi: Tôi phải đội mũ bảo hiểm.
sentences.formula: I + must + V + a + N.

sentences.en1: You mustn't touch the crown.
sentences.en2: You mustn't touch the crown.
sentences.vi: Bạn không được chạm vào vương miện.
sentences.formula: You + mustn't + V + the + N.

sentences.en1: She must be quiet in the museum.
sentences.en2: She must be quiet in the museum.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy phải giữ yên lặng trong bảo tàng.
sentences.formula: He/She + must + be + adj + in + the + N.

sentences.en1: We mustn't run near the dinosaur.
sentences.en2: We mustn't run near the dinosaur.
sentences.vi: Chúng ta không được chạy gần con khủng long.
sentences.formula: We + mustn't + V + near + the + N.

sentences.en1: He must hide the map.
sentences.en2: He must hide the map.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy phải giấu tấm bản đồ.
sentences.formula: He/She + must + V + the + N.

unit: U1.2: Direct and indirect objects (Give me the... / Give the... to me)

sentences.en1: Give me the sword, please.
sentences.en2: Give me the sword, please.
sentences.vi: Làm ơn đưa cho tôi thanh kiếm.
sentences.formula: V + me + the + N, please.

sentences.en1: Give the necklace to the queen.
sentences.en2: Give the necklace to the queen.
sentences.vi: Hãy đưa vòng cổ cho nữ hoàng.
sentences.formula: V + the + N + to + the + N.

sentences.en1: I gave her the bracelet.
sentences.en2: I gave her the bracelet.
sentences.vi: Tôi đã đưa cho cô ấy chiếc vòng tay.
sentences.formula: I + gave + her + the + N.

sentences.en1: Pass me the shield.
sentences.en2: Pass me the shield.
sentences.vi: Chuyển cho tôi cái khiên.
sentences.formula: V + me + the + N.

sentences.en1: Give the storyteller the book.
sentences.en2: Give the storyteller the book.
sentences.vi: Hãy đưa cho người kể chuyện cuốn sách.
sentences.formula: V + the + N + the + N.

sentences.en1: I like the forest and the lake.
sentences.en2: I like the forest and the lake.
sentences.vi: Tôi thích khu rừng và hồ nước.
sentences.formula: I + like + the + N + and + the + N.

sentences.en1: I was tired, so I went home.
sentences.en2: I was tired, so I went home.
sentences.vi: Tôi mệt, vì vậy tôi đã về nhà.
sentences.formula: I + was + adj, so + I + V2 + N.

sentences.en1: I went home because I was tired.
sentences.en2: I went home because I was tired.
sentences.vi: Tôi đã về nhà vì tôi mệt.
sentences.formula: I + V2 + N + because + I + was + adj.

sentences.en1: The island is small but beautiful.
sentences.en2: The island is small but beautiful.
sentences.vi: Hòn đảo nhỏ nhưng đẹp.
sentences.formula: The + N + is + adj + but + adj.

sentences.en1: We had a picnic, but it rained.
sentences.en2: We had a picnic, but it rained.
sentences.vi: Chúng tôi đã có một buổi dã ngoại, nhưng trời mưa.
sentences.formula: We + V2 + a + N, but + it + V2.

sentences.en1: When I was young, I could climb trees.
sentences.en2: When I was young, I could climb trees.
sentences.vi: Khi tôi còn nhỏ, tôi có thể trèo cây.
sentences.formula: When + I + was + adj, I + could + V + N(s).

sentences.en1: I couldn't swim in the river.
sentences.en2: I couldn't swim in the river.
sentences.vi: Tôi không thể bơi ở con sông.
sentences.formula: I + couldn't + V + in + the + N.

sentences.en1: Could you see the mountain?
sentences.en2: Could you see the mountain?
sentences.vi: Bạn có thể nhìn thấy ngọn núi không?
sentences.formula: Could + you + V + the + N?

sentences.en1: She could run in the field.
sentences.en2: She could run in the field.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy có thể chạy trên cánh đồng.
sentences.formula: He/She + could + V + in + the + N.

sentences.en1: They couldn't find the path.
sentences.en2: They couldn't find the path.
sentences.vi: Họ không thể tìm thấy con đường.
sentences.formula: They + couldn't + V + the + N.

sentences.en1: I was climbing a tree.
sentences.en2: I was climbing a tree.
sentences.vi: Tôi đang trèo một cái cây.
sentences.formula: I + was + V-ing + a + N.

sentences.en1: We were playing tennis.
sentences.en2: We were playing tennis.
sentences.vi: Chúng tôi đang chơi quần vợt.
sentences.formula: We + were + V-ing + N.

sentences.en1: She was calling the emergency services.
sentences.en2: She was calling the emergency services.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy đang gọi các dịch vụ khẩn cấp.
sentences.formula: He/She + was + V-ing + the + N(s).

sentences.en1: They were watching the flood.
sentences.en2: They were watching the flood.
sentences.vi: Họ đang xem trận lũ lụt.
sentences.formula: They + were + V-ing + the + N.

sentences.en1: The fire engine was coming.
sentences.en2: The fire engine was coming.
sentences.vi: Xe cứu hỏa đang đến.
sentences.formula: The + N + was + V-ing.

unit: U3.2: Past continuous questions (What was... doing? / Were...?)

sentences.en1: What was she doing?
sentences.en2: What was she doing?
sentences.vi: Cô ấy đang làm gì vậy?
sentences.formula: What + was + he/she + V-ing?

sentences.en1: Were they playing?
sentences.en2: Were they playing?
sentences.vi: Họ đang chơi phải không?
sentences.formula: Were + they + V-ing?

sentences.en1: What were you eating?
sentences.en2: What were you eating?
sentences.vi: Bạn đang ăn gì vậy?
sentences.formula: What + were + you + V-ing?

sentences.en1: Was he using the extinguisher?
sentences.en2: Was he using the extinguisher?
sentences.vi: Anh ấy có đang dùng bình cứu hỏa không?
sentences.formula: Was + he/she + V-ing + the + N?

sentences.en1: Where were you going?
sentences.en2: Where were you going?
sentences.vi: Bạn đang đi đâu vậy?
sentences.formula: Where + were + you + V-ing?

unit: U4.1: Prepositions of time (at, in, on)

sentences.en1: The train leaves at eight o'clock.
sentences.en2: The train leaves at eight o'clock.
sentences.vi: Tàu khởi hành lúc 8 giờ.
sentences.formula: The + N + V(s) + at + time.

sentences.en1: My birthday is in September.
sentences.en2: My birthday is in September.
sentences.vi: Sinh nhật của tôi vào tháng Chín.
sentences.formula: My + N + is + in + month.

sentences.en1: We travel on Sunday.
sentences.en2: We travel on Sunday.
sentences.vi: Chúng tôi đi du lịch vào Chủ nhật.
sentences.formula: We + V + on + day.

sentences.en1: I go to bed at ten o'clock.
sentences.en2: I go to bed at ten o'clock.
sentences.vi: Tôi đi ngủ lúc 10 giờ.
sentences.formula: I + V + to + bed + at + time.

sentences.en1: The funfair opens in the morning.
sentences.en2: The funfair opens in the morning.
sentences.vi: Hội chợ vui chơi mở cửa vào buổi sáng.
sentences.formula: The + N + V(s) + in + the + N.

unit: U4.2: Past continuous & past simple (interrupted action)

sentences.en1: I was having dinner when you phoned me.
sentences.en2: I was having dinner when you phoned me.
sentences.vi: Tôi đang ăn tối thì bạn gọi điện cho tôi.
sentences.formula: I + was + V-ing + N + when + you + V2 + me.

sentences.en1: She was buying a ticket when she saw him.
sentences.en2: She was buying a ticket when she saw him.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy đang mua vé thì nhìn thấy anh ấy.
sentences.formula: He/She + was + V-ing + a + N + when + he/she + V2 + him/her.

sentences.en1: We were waiting on the platform when the train arrived.
sentences.en2: We were waiting on the platform when the train arrived.
sentences.vi: Chúng tôi đang đợi ở sân ga thì tàu đến.
sentences.formula: We + were + V-ing + on + the + N + when + the + N + V2.

sentences.en1: He was carrying a suitcase when he fell.
sentences.en2: He was carrying a suitcase when he fell.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy đang mang va li thì bị ngã.
sentences.formula: He/She + was + V-ing + a + N + when + he/she + V2.

sentences.en1: They were talking when the conductor appeared.
sentences.en2: They were talking when the conductor appeared.
sentences.vi: Họ đang nói chuyện thì người soát vé xuất hiện.
sentences.formula: They + were + V-ing + when + the + N + V2.

sentences.en1: He used to be a police officer.
sentences.en2: He used to be a police officer.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy đã từng là một cảnh sát.
sentences.formula: He/She + used to + be + a + N.

sentences.en1: I used to play football.
sentences.en2: I used to play football.
sentences.vi: Tôi đã từng chơi bóng đá.
sentences.formula: I + used to + V + N.

sentences.en1: She used to have long, straight hair.
sentences.en2: She used to have long, straight hair.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy đã từng có mái tóc dài thẳng.
sentences.formula: He/She + used to + have + adj + N.

sentences.en1: Did you use to wear a uniform?
sentences.en2: Did you use to wear a uniform?
sentences.vi: Bạn đã từng mặc đồng phục phải không?
sentences.formula: Did + you + use to + V + a + N?

sentences.en1: They used to live in a village.
sentences.en2: They used to live in a village.
sentences.vi: Họ đã từng sống trong một ngôi làng.
sentences.formula: They + used to + V + in + a + N.

sentences.en1: We had to be really careful.
sentences.en2: We had to be really careful.
sentences.vi: Chúng tôi đã phải thực sự cẩn thận.
sentences.formula: We + had to + be + adv + adj.

sentences.en1: I had to do my homework.
sentences.en2: I had to do my homework.
sentences.vi: Tôi đã phải làm bài tập về nhà.
sentences.formula: I + had to + V + my + N.

sentences.en1: She had to call the police.
sentences.en2: She had to call the police.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy đã phải gọi cảnh sát.
sentences.formula: He/She + had to + V + the + N.

sentences.en1: Did you have to wear a walkie-talkie?
sentences.en2: Did you have to wear a walkie-talkie?
sentences.vi: Bạn đã phải đeo bộ đàm phải không?
sentences.formula: Did + you + have to + V + a + N?

sentences.en1: He had to draw a sketch of the criminal.
sentences.en2: He had to draw a sketch of the criminal.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy đã phải vẽ một bản phác thảo của tên tội phạm.
sentences.formula: He/She + had to + V + a + N + of + the + N.

sentences.en1: A dragon is more dangerous than a unicorn.
sentences.en2: A dragon is more dangerous than a unicorn.
sentences.vi: Một con rồng nguy hiểm hơn một con kỳ lân. 🐉⚔️🦄
sentences.formula: A + N + is + more adj + than + a + N.

sentences.en1: This is the most beautiful feather.
sentences.en2: This is the most beautiful feather.
sentences.vi: Đây là chiếc lông vũ đẹp nhất. 🪶✨
sentences.formula: This + is + the + most + adj + N.

sentences.en1: The T-rex was the worst dinosaur.
sentences.en2: The T-rex was the worst dinosaur.
sentences.vi: Khủng long bạo chúa là loài khủng long tệ nhất. 🦖👎
sentences.formula: The + N + was + the + worst + N.

sentences.en1: Is a centaur more interesting than a mermaid?
sentences.en2: Is a centaur more interesting than a mermaid?
sentences.vi: Một nhân mã có thú vị hơn một nàng tiên cá không? 🐎🧔‍♂️ vs 🧜‍♀️
sentences.formula: Is + a + N + more adj + than + a + N?

sentences.en1: This treasure chest is the best.
sentences.en2: This treasure chest is the best.
sentences.vi: Rương kho báu này là tốt nhất. 💰📦👑
sentences.formula: This + N + is + the + best.

sentences.en1: What does a unicorn look like?
sentences.en2: What does a unicorn look like?

sentences.formula: What + does + a + N + look like?

sentences.en1: It looks like a horse with a horn.
sentences.en2: It looks like a horse with a horn.
sentences.vi: Nó trông giống một con ngựa với một cái sừng. 🐴➕🦄
sentences.formula: It + looks like + a + N + with + a + N.

sentences.en1: The scales look like shiny armour.
sentences.en2: The scales look like shiny armour.
sentences.vi: Những cái vảy trông giống như áo giáp sáng bóng. 🐟✨🛡️
sentences.formula: The + N(s) + look like + adj + N.

sentences.en1: That mythical beast looks scary.
sentences.en2: That mythical beast looks scary.

unit: U7.1: Possessive pronouns (mine, yours, his, hers...)

sentences.en1: That trumpet is mine.
sentences.en2: That trumpet is mine.

sentences.en2: The saxophone is his.

sentences.en2: That beautiful harp is hers.

sentences.en1: Is this the string which is broken?
sentences.en2: Is this the string which is broken?
sentences.vi: Đây có phải là dây đàn bị đứt không? 🎻🧵❌

sentences.en2: What will you be when you grow up?

sentences.en2: He will fly a rocket.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy sẽ lái một tên lửa. 👦🚀🛸

sentences.en2: Will we see a comet?
sentences.vi: Chúng ta sẽ nhìn thấy một sao chổi phải không? ☄️👀❓
sentences.formula: Will + we + V + a + N?

sentences.en2: They will visit the planetarium.
sentences.vi: Họ sẽ đến thăm cung thiên văn. 🛰️👥
sentences.formula: They + will + V + the + N.

sentences.en2: Please play the triangle quietly.
sentences.vi: Làm ơn chơi kẻng tam giác một cách yên lặng. 🔺🎶🤫

sentences.formula: He/She + V(s) + adv + in + the + N.

sentences.en2: He drives the spaceship carefully.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy lái con tàu vũ trụ một cách cẩn thận. 👨🚀🚀🤲

sentences.en2: Walk slowly in the space station.
sentences.vi: Hãy đi bộ chậm rãi trong trạm vũ trụ. 🚶🐌🛰️

sentences.en2: They talked loudly about the UFO.

unit: U9.1: Expressions of quantity (a bottle of, a packet of...)

sentences.en2: Pass me a can of lemonade, please.

sentences.en2: How much cheese do we need?

sentences.en2: How many bottles of water?
sentences.vi: Bao nhiêu chai nước? 💧💧❓

sentences.en2: How much wood is in the basket?

sentences.en2: How many sleeping bags are there?

sentences.en2: How much time do we have?

sentences.en2: Put on your goggles and apron.

unit: U0.2: Explaining a process (First, then, next...)

sentences.en1: First, put on your safety equipment.
sentences.en2: First, put on your safety equipment.
