sentences.en1: He used to wear a big hat.
sentences.en2: He used to wear a big hat.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy đã từng đội một cái mũ to. 🎩
sentences.formula: He/She + used to + V + a + adj + N.

sentences.en1: Did they use to live in a jail?
sentences.en2: Did they use to live in a jail?
sentences.vi: Họ đã từng sống trong nhà tù phải không? 🏚️❓
sentences.formula: Did + they + use to + V + in + a + N?

sentences.en1: We had to be careful of the bison.
sentences.en2: We had to be careful of the bison.
sentences.vi: Chúng tôi đã phải cẩn thận với con bò rừng. 🐂⚠️
sentences.formula: We + had to + be + adj + of + the + N.

sentences.en1: She had to cook food on the fire.
sentences.en2: She had to cook food on the fire.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy đã phải nấu thức ăn trên lửa. 👩🍳🔥
sentences.formula: He/She + had to + V + N + on + the + N.

sentences.en1: They didn't have to use a saddle.
sentences.en2: They didn't have to use a saddle.
sentences.vi: Họ đã không phải sử dụng yên ngựa. 🐎❌
sentences.formula: They + didn't + have to + V + a + N.

sentences.en1: Tourists often buy souvenirs from the market.
sentences.en2: Tourists often buy souvenirs from the market.
sentences.vi: Khách du lịch thường mua quà lưu niệm từ chợ. 🧳🎁🛍️
sentences.formula: N(s) + adv + V + N(s) + from + the + N.

sentences.en1: This beautiful carpet is from Turkey.
sentences.en2: This beautiful carpet is from Turkey.
sentences.vi: Tấm thảm đẹp này đến từ Thổ Nhĩ Kỳ. 🧶🇹🇷
sentences.formula: This + adj + N + is + from + place.

sentences.en1: I'd like to visit the mosque in Istanbul.
sentences.en2: I'd like to visit the mosque in Istanbul.
sentences.vi: Tôi muốn đến thăm nhà thờ Hồi giáo ở Istanbul. 🕌
sentences.formula: I'd like to + V + the + N + in + place.

sentences.en1: She wore sunglasses and a colourful cushion.
sentences.en2: She wore sunglasses and a colourful cushion.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy đã đeo kính râm và một cái gối tựa nhiều màu. 🕶️🛋️
sentences.formula: He/She + V2 + N(s) and + a + adj + N.

sentences.en1: We took many photos of the mosaic.
sentences.en2: We took many photos of the mosaic.
sentences.vi: Chúng tôi đã chụp nhiều ảnh của bức tranh khảm. 📸🎨
sentences.formula: We + V2 + many + N(s) + of + the + N.

sentences.en1: You should try the local food.
sentences.en2: You should try the local food.
sentences.vi: Bạn nên thử thức ăn địa phương. 🍽️👍
sentences.formula: You + should + V + the + adj + N.

sentences.en1: You shouldn't forget your passport.
sentences.en2: You shouldn't forget your passport.
sentences.vi: Bạn không nên quên hộ chiếu của mình. 📘❌
sentences.formula: You + shouldn't + V + your + N.

sentences.en1: It's a good idea to wear comfortable shoes.
sentences.en2: It's a good idea to wear comfortable shoes.
sentences.vi: Đó là một ý kiến hay khi mang giày thoải mái. 👟😊
sentences.formula: It's + a + good + idea + to + V + adj + N(s).

sentences.en1: Why don't you take a hop-on hop-off bus?
sentences.en2: Why don't you take a hop-on hop-off bus?
sentences.vi: Tại sao bạn không đi xe buýt du lịch lên xuống tự do? 🚌❓
sentences.formula: Why + don't + you + V + a + N?

sentences.en1: Remember to take a map with you.
sentences.en2: Remember to take a map with you.
sentences.vi: Hãy nhớ mang theo một tấm bản đồ. 🗺️🧭
sentences.formula: V + to + V + a + N + with + you.

sentences.en1: The actor wore a funny wig and a mask.
sentences.en2: The actor wore a funny wig and a mask.
sentences.vi: Diễn viên đã đội một bộ tóc giả buồn cười và một cái mặt nạ. 🎭😄
sentences.formula: The + N + V2 + a + adj + N and + a + N.

sentences.en1: Shakespeare wrote many famous plays.
sentences.en2: Shakespeare wrote many famous plays.
sentences.vi: Shakespeare đã viết nhiều vở kịch nổi tiếng. 📜🎬
sentences.formula: Name + V2 + many + adj + N(s).

sentences.en1: The audience clapped their hands loudly.
sentences.en2: The audience clapped their hands loudly.
sentences.vi: Khán giả đã vỗ tay rất to. 👏🔊
sentences.formula: The + N + V2 + their + N(s) + adv.

sentences.en1: We need some props for the comedy.
sentences.en2: We need some props for the comedy.
sentences.vi: Chúng ta cần một vài đạo cụ cho vở hài kịch. 🎩🎭
sentences.formula: We + need + some + N(s) for + the + N.

sentences.en1: She is performing her favourite character.
sentences.en2: She is performing her favourite character.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy đang biểu diễn nhân vật yêu thích của mình. 👩🎤🎬
sentences.formula: He/She + is + V-ing + his/her + adj + N.

unit: U7.2: Types of performances (tragedy, comedy, musical)

sentences.en1: This play is a tragedy, not a comedy.
sentences.en2: This play is a tragedy, not a comedy.
sentences.vi: Vở kịch này là một bi kịch, không phải hài kịch. 😢❌😂
sentences.formula: This + N + is + a + N, + not + a + N.

sentences.en1: The musical has dancing and singing.
sentences.en2: The musical has dancing and singing.
sentences.vi: Vở nhạc kịch có múa và hát. 💃🎤
sentences.formula: The + N + has + V-ing and + V-ing.

sentences.en1: I prefer comedies because they are funny.
sentences.en2: I prefer comedies because they are funny.
sentences.vi: Tôi thích hài kịch hơn vì chúng vui. 😄❤️
sentences.formula: I + prefer + N(s) + because + they + are + adj.

sentences.en1: He is a talented songwriter and guitarist.
sentences.en2: He is a talented songwriter and guitarist.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy là một người sáng tác bài hát và nghệ sĩ ghi-ta tài năng. 🎵🎸
sentences.formula: He/She + is + a + adj + N and + N.

sentences.en1: They gave her flowers after the performance.
sentences.en2: They gave her flowers after the performance.
sentences.vi: Họ đã tặng cô ấy hoa sau buổi biểu diễn. 💐🎭
sentences.formula: They + V2 + her + N(s) + after + the + N.

sentences.en1: My mum is a businesswoman. She travels a lot.
sentences.en2: My mum is a businesswoman. She travels a lot.
sentences.vi: Mẹ tôi là một nữ doanh nhân. Bà ấy đi du lịch rất nhiều. 👩💼✈️
sentences.formula: My + N + is + a + N. He/She + V(s) + a lot.

sentences.en1: I want to be a computer programmer.
sentences.en2: I want to be a computer programmer.
sentences.vi: Tôi muốn trở thành một lập trình viên máy tính. 💻👨💻
sentences.formula: I + want to + be + a + N.

sentences.en1: Engineers need good maths skills.
sentences.en2: Engineers need good maths skills.
sentences.vi: Các kỹ sư cần có kỹ năng toán học tốt. 👷➗🛠️
sentences.formula: N(s) + need + adj + N + N(s).

sentences.en1: Being a farmer is hard work.
sentences.en2: Being a farmer is hard work.
sentences.vi: Làm nông dân là công việc vất vả. 👩🌾🌾
sentences.formula: V-ing + a + N + is + adj + N.

sentences.en1: What profession are you interested in?
sentences.en2: What profession are you interested in?
sentences.vi: Bạn quan tâm đến nghề nghiệp gì? 💼❓
sentences.formula: What + N + are + you + interested in?

unit: U8.2: Making predictions about the future (will/won't)

sentences.en1: Robots will do many jobs in the future.
sentences.en2: Robots will do many jobs in the future.
sentences.vi: Người máy sẽ làm nhiều công việc trong tương lai. 🤖💼🔮
sentences.formula: N(s) + will + V + many + N(s) in + the + N.

sentences.en1: We won't use cash anymore.
sentences.en2: We won't use cash anymore.
sentences.vi: Chúng ta sẽ không dùng tiền mặt nữa. 💵❌
sentences.formula: We + won't + V + N + anymore.

sentences.en1: Will there be more cleaners or fewer?
sentences.en2: Will there be more cleaners or fewer?
sentences.vi: Sẽ có nhiều nhân viên vệ sinh hơn hay ít hơn? 🧹❓
sentences.formula: Will + there + be + more + N(s) or + fewer?

sentences.en1: People might work from home.
sentences.en2: People might work from home.
sentences.vi: Mọi người có thể làm việc từ nhà. 👨💻🏠
sentences.formula: N(s) + might + V + from + home.

sentences.en1: I think my future career will be exciting.
sentences.en2: I think my future career will be exciting.
sentences.vi: Tôi nghĩ sự nghiệp tương lai của tôi sẽ rất hào hứng. 🔮🎉
sentences.formula: I + think + my + adj + N + will + be + adj.

sentences.en1: The captain stood on the deck.
sentences.en2: The captain stood on the deck.
sentences.vi: Thuyền trưởng đứng trên boong tàu. 🧑‍✈️🚢
sentences.formula: The + N + V2 + on + the + N.

sentences.en1: We need to check the lifeboat.
sentences.en2: We need to check the lifeboat.
sentences.vi: Chúng ta cần kiểm tra thuyền cứu sinh. 🚤✅
sentences.formula: We + need to + V + the + N.

sentences.en1: Look through the porthole!
sentences.en2: Look through the porthole!
sentences.vi: Hãy nhìn qua cửa sổ tàu! 👀🪟
sentences.formula: V + through + the + N!

sentences.en1: They sailed across the ocean for months.
sentences.en2: They sailed across the ocean for months.
sentences.vi: Họ đã đi thuyền vượt qua đại dương trong nhiều tháng. ⛵🌊🗓️
sentences.formula: They + V2 + across + the + N + for + N(s).

sentences.en1: The mast is very tall.
sentences.en2: The mast is very tall.
sentences.vi: Cột buồm rất cao. ⛵📏
sentences.formula: The + N + is + very + adj.

unit: U9.2: Solving a mystery (past modals: might have, could have)

sentences.en1: They might have seen a pirate ship.
sentences.en2: They might have seen a pirate ship.
sentences.vi: Họ có thể đã nhìn thấy một con tàu cướp biển. 🏴‍☠️🚢❓
sentences.formula: They + might have + V3 + a + N + N.

sentences.en1: He could have lost the compass.
sentences.en2: He could have lost the compass.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy có thể đã làm mất la bàn. 🧭❓
sentences.formula: He/She + could have + V3 + the + N.

sentences.en1: The treasure must have been here.
sentences.en2: The treasure must have been here.
sentences.vi: Kho báu chắc hẳn đã từng ở đây. 💰📍
sentences.formula: The + N + must have + been + here.

sentences.en1: Who could have taken the map?
sentences.en2: Who could have taken the map?
sentences.vi: Ai có thể đã lấy tấm bản đồ? 🗺️❓
sentences.formula: Who + could have + V3 + the + N?

sentences.en1: It was a great adventure.
sentences.en2: It was a great adventure.
sentences.vi: Đó là một cuộc phiêu lưu tuyệt vời. 🗺️🌟
sentences.formula: It + was + a + adj + N.

unit: U0.1: Present Perfect with already & yet

sentences.en1: Have you had some food yet?
sentences.en2: Have you had some food yet?
sentences.vi: Bạn đã ăn chút thức ăn nào chưa? 🍽️❓
sentences.formula: Have + you + V3 + some + N + yet?

sentences.en1: We have already met.
sentences.en2: We have already met.
sentences.vi: Chúng tôi đã gặp nhau rồi. 👋✅
sentences.formula: We + have + already + V3.

sentences.en1: She has already finished her homework.
sentences.en2: She has already finished her homework.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy đã hoàn thành bài tập về nhà rồi. 📚✅
sentences.formula: He/She + has + already + V3 + his/her + N.

sentences.en1: Have they seen the new bike rack yet?
sentences.en2: Have they seen the new bike rack yet?
sentences.vi: Họ đã nhìn thấy giá để xe đạp mới chưa? 🚲🆕❓
sentences.formula: Have + they + V3 + the + adj + N + yet?

sentences.en1: I haven't cleaned the litter bin yet.
sentences.en2: I haven't cleaned the litter bin yet.
sentences.vi: Tôi chưa dọn thùng rác. 🗑️❌
sentences.formula: I + haven't + V3 + the + N + yet.

sentences.en1: I’m the leopard who likes to rap.
sentences.en2: I’m the leopard who likes to rap.
sentences.vi: Tôi là con báo thích đọc rap. 🐆🎤
sentences.formula: I’m + the + N + who + V(s) + to + V.

sentences.en1: This is the basketball hoop which is new.
sentences.en2: This is the basketball hoop which is new.
sentences.vi: Đây là rổ bóng rổ mới. 🏀🆕
sentences.formula: This + is + the + N + which + is + adj.

sentences.en1: That is the running track where we exercise.
sentences.en2: That is the running track where we exercise.
sentences.vi: Kia là đường chạy nơi chúng tôi tập thể dục. 🏃‍♂️📍
sentences.formula: That + is + the + N + where + we + V.

sentences.en1: He is the student who found the bell.
sentences.en2: He is the student who found the bell.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy là học sinh đã tìm thấy cái chuông. 👦🔔
sentences.formula: He/She + is + the + N + who + V2 + the + N.

sentences.en1: Is this the net which is broken?
sentences.en2: Is this the net which is broken?
sentences.vi: Đây có phải là tấm lưới bị rách không? 🕸️❓
sentences.formula: Is + this + the + N + which + is + adj?

unit: U1.1: Present Perfect with for & since

sentences.en1: I’ve had these lovely spots since I was a cub.
sentences.en2: I’ve had these lovely spots since I was a cub.
sentences.vi: Tôi đã có những đốm đáng yêu này từ khi tôi còn là con non. 🐆👶
sentences.formula: I’ve + V3 + these + adj + N(s) + since + I + was + a + N.

sentences.en1: She has lived here for eleven weeks.
sentences.en2: She has lived here for eleven weeks.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy đã sống ở đây được mười một tuần. 🏠🗓️
sentences.formula: He/She + has + V3 + here + for + time.

sentences.en1: We have been friends for a long time.
sentences.en2: We have been friends for a long time.
sentences.vi: Chúng tôi đã là bạn trong một thời gian dài. 👫⏳
sentences.formula: We + have + V3 + N(s) + for + a + adj + time.

sentences.en1: He has known the secret since yesterday.
sentences.en2: He has known the secret since yesterday.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy đã biết bí mật từ hôm qua. 🤫📅
sentences.formula: He/She + has + V3 + the + N + since + time.

sentences.en1: Have you had this treasure map for years?
sentences.en2: Have you had this treasure map for years?
sentences.vi: Bạn đã có tấm bản đồ kho báu này nhiều năm rồi phải không? 🗺️💰❓
sentences.formula: Have + you + V3 + this + N + N + for + N(s)?

sentences.en1: How long have you had them?
sentences.en2: How long have you had them?
sentences.vi: Bạn đã có chúng bao lâu rồi? ⏳❓
sentences.formula: How long + have + you + V3 + them?

sentences.en1: How long has he been a pirate?
sentences.en2: How long has he been a pirate?
sentences.vi: Anh ấy đã là cướp biển bao lâu rồi? 🏴‍☠️⏳
sentences.formula: How long + has + he/she + V3 + a + N?

sentences.en1: How long have they buried the chest?
sentences.en2: How long have they buried the chest?
sentences.vi: Họ đã chôn rương kho báu bao lâu rồi? ⚰️💰❓
sentences.formula: How long + have + they + V3 + the + N?

sentences.en1: How long have you been on this island?
sentences.en2: How long have you been on this island?
sentences.vi: Bạn đã ở trên đảo này bao lâu rồi? 🏝️⏳
sentences.formula: How long + have + you + V3 + on + this + N?

sentences.en1: How long has the anchor been here?
sentences.en2: How long has the anchor been here?
sentences.vi: Mỏ neo đã ở đây bao lâu rồi? ⚓📍❓
sentences.formula: How long + has + the + N + V3 + here?

sentences.en1: You don’t need to drive a car.
sentences.en2: You don’t need to drive a car.
sentences.vi: Bạn không cần phải lái xe ô tô. 🚗❌
sentences.formula: You + don’t + need to + V + a + N.

sentences.en1: All you need to do is climb.
sentences.en2: All you need to do is climb.
sentences.vi: Tất cả những gì bạn cần làm là leo trèo. 🧗✅
sentences.formula: All + you + need to + do + is + V.

sentences.en1: We need to protect the environment.
sentences.en2: We need to protect the environment.
sentences.vi: Chúng ta cần bảo vệ môi trường. 🌍🤲
sentences.formula: We + need to + V + the + N.

sentences.en1: Do I need to wear a helmet?
sentences.en2: Do I need to wear a helmet?
sentences.vi: Tôi có cần đội mũ bảo hiểm không? ⛑️❓
sentences.formula: Do + I + need to + V + a + N?

sentences.en1: She needs to catch the cable car.
sentences.en2: She needs to catch the cable car.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy cần bắt cáp treo. 🚠🏃‍♀️
sentences.formula: He/She + needs to + V + the + N.

unit: U2.2: Future predictions with will / won’t

sentences.en1: There will be a lot of noise.
sentences.en2: There will be a lot of noise.
sentences.vi: Sẽ có rất nhiều tiếng ồn. 📢🔮
sentences.formula: There + will + be + a lot of + N.

sentences.en1: There won’t be any trees left.
sentences.en2: There won’t be any trees left.
sentences.vi: Sẽ không còn cây nào cả. 🌳❌
sentences.formula: There + won’t + be + any + N(s) + left.

sentences.en1: Solar panels will power our homes.
sentences.en2: Solar panels will power our homes.
sentences.vi: Các tấm pin mặt trời sẽ cung cấp năng lượng cho nhà chúng ta. ☀️🏠
sentences.formula: N(s) + will + V + our + N(s).

sentences.en1: Will jet packs be popular?
sentences.en2: Will jet packs be popular?
sentences.vi: Ba lô phản lực sẽ phổ biến chứ? 🚀❓
sentences.formula: Will + N(s) + be + adj?

sentences.en1: People won't use petrol cars.
sentences.en2: People won't use petrol cars.
sentences.vi: Mọi người sẽ không dùng xe chạy xăng nữa. 🚗⛽❌
sentences.formula: N(s) + won't + V + N + N(s).

sentences.en1: Who was this den built by?
sentences.en2: Who was this den built by?
sentences.vi: Hang động này được xây bởi ai? 🏚️❓
sentences.formula: Who + was + this + N + V3 + by?

sentences.en1: The walls weren’t built so well.
sentences.en2: The walls weren’t built so well.
sentences.vi: Những bức tường không được xây quá tốt. 🧱❌
sentences.formula: The + N(s) + weren't + V3 + so + adv.

sentences.en1: This tomb was discovered by an archaeologist.
sentences.en2: This tomb was discovered by an archaeologist.
sentences.vi: Ngôi mộ này được phát hiện bởi một nhà khảo cổ. ⚰️🧭
sentences.formula: This + N + was + V3 + by + a + N.

sentences.en1: Were the pyramids built by slaves?
sentences.en2: Were the pyramids built by slaves?
sentences.vi: Các kim tự tháp được xây bởi nô lệ phải không? 🗿👷❓
sentences.formula: Were + the + N(s) + V3 + by + N(s)?

sentences.en1: The chariot was made of wood.
sentences.en2: The chariot was made of wood.
sentences.vi: Cỗ xe chiến mã được làm từ gỗ. 🐎🪵
sentences.formula: The + N + was + made + of + N.

unit: U3.2: Quantifiers (a lot of, lots of, a few, a little)

sentences.en1: There were lots of trees in this jungle.
sentences.en2: There were lots of trees in this jungle.
sentences.vi: Đã có rất nhiều cây trong khu rừng này. 🌳🌿
sentences.formula: There + were + lots of + N(s) + in + this + N.

sentences.en1: I need a little time to think.
sentences.en2: I need a little time to think.
sentences.vi: Tôi cần một chút thời gian để suy nghĩ. ⏳🤔
sentences.formula: I + need + a little + N + to + V.

sentences.en1: We have a few hieroglyphics to translate.
sentences.en2: We have a few hieroglyphics to translate.
sentences.vi: Chúng tôi có một vài chữ tượng hình cần dịch. 🔤📜
sentences.formula: We + have + a few + N(s) + to + V.

sentences.en1: There isn't a lot of water in the desert.
sentences.en2: There isn't a lot of water in the desert.
sentences.vi: Không có nhiều nước trong sa mạc. 🏜️💧
sentences.formula: There + isn't + a lot of + N + in + the + N.

sentences.en1: He has a little knowledge about mummies.
sentences.en2: He has a little knowledge about mummies.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy có một chút kiến thức về xác ướp. ⚰️🧠
sentences.formula: He/She + has + a little + N + about + N(s).

sentences.en1: We could play some volleyball.
sentences.en2: We could play some volleyball.
sentences.vi: Chúng ta có thể chơi một ít bóng chuyền. 🏐🤔
sentences.formula: We + could + V + some + N.

sentences.en1: You could try to teach me archery.
sentences.en2: You could try to teach me archery.
sentences.vi: Bạn có thể thử dạy tôi bắn cung. 🏹👨‍🏫
sentences.formula: You + could + try to + V + me + N.

sentences.en1: She could be a great gymnast.
sentences.en2: She could be a great gymnast.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy có thể là một vận động viên thể dục tuyệt vời. 🤸‍♀️🌟
sentences.formula: He/She + could + be + a + adj + N.

sentences.en1: Could we watch the fencing match?
sentences.en2: Could we watch the fencing match?
sentences.vi: Chúng ta có thể xem trận đấu kiếm không? 🤺👀❓
sentences.formula: Could + we + V + the + N + N?

sentences.en1: They could win a medal.
sentences.en2: They could win a medal.
sentences.vi: Họ có thể giành được huy chương. 🏅🎖️
sentences.formula: They + could + V + a + N.

unit: U4.2: Present Continuous for future arrangements

sentences.en1: I’m running in the morning.
sentences.en2: I’m running in the morning.
sentences.vi: Tôi sẽ chạy bộ vào buổi sáng. 🏃‍♂️🌅
sentences.formula: I’m + V-ing + in + the + N.

sentences.en1: She is cycling on her bike later.
sentences.en2: She is cycling on her bike later.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy sẽ đi xe đạp sau. 🚲⏳
sentences.formula: He/She + is + V-ing + on + his/her + N + later.

sentences.en1: Are they playing basketball tomorrow?
sentences.en2: Are they playing basketball tomorrow?
sentences.vi: Họ sẽ chơi bóng rổ vào ngày mai phải không? 🏀📅❓
sentences.formula: Are + they + V-ing + N + tomorrow?

sentences.en1: We aren't going to the stadium on Sunday.
sentences.en2: We aren't going to the stadium on Sunday.
sentences.vi: Chúng tôi sẽ không đến sân vận động vào Chủ nhật. 🏟️❌
sentences.formula: We + aren't + V-ing + to + the + N + on + day.

sentences.en1: Is he competing in the long jump?
sentences.en2: Is he competing in the long jump?
sentences.vi: Anh ấy sẽ thi đấu môn nhảy xa phải không? 🦘🏅❓
sentences.formula: Is + he/she + V-ing + in + the + N?

unit: U5.1: Present Perfect with ever & never

sentences.en1: Have you ever been to London Zoo?
sentences.en2: Have you ever been to London Zoo?
sentences.vi: Bạn đã từng đến Sở thú Luân Đôn chưa? 🦁🇬🇧❓
sentences.formula: Have + you + ever + V3 + to + place?

sentences.en1: No, she hasn’t. She’s never been.
sentences.en2: No, she hasn’t. She’s never been.
sentences.vi: Không, cô ấy chưa. Cô ấy chưa từng đến. ❌👧
sentences.formula: No, + he/she + hasn’t. He/She + 's + never + V3.

sentences.en1: Have you ever eaten fish and chips?
sentences.en2: Have you ever eaten fish and chips?
sentences.vi: Bạn đã từng ăn cá và khoai tây chiên chưa? 🐟🍟❓
sentences.formula: Have + you + ever + V3 + N and + N(s)?

sentences.en1: I have never seen the Tower of London.
sentences.en2: I have never seen the Tower of London.
sentences.vi: Tôi chưa bao giờ nhìn thấy Tháp Luân Đôn. 🗼🇬🇧❌
sentences.formula: I + have + never + V3 + the + N + of + place.

sentences.en1: Has he ever bought anything from a grocer's?
sentences.en2: Has he ever bought anything from a grocer's?
sentences.vi: Anh ấy đã từng mua gì từ cửa hàng tạp hóa chưa? 🛒❓
sentences.formula: Has + he/she + ever + V3 + anything + from + a + N?

unit: U5.2: Present Perfect & Past Simple together

sentences.en1: I went to the butcher's yesterday.
sentences.en2: I went to the butcher's yesterday.
sentences.vi: Tôi đã đến cửa hàng thịt hôm qua. 🥩📅
sentences.formula: I + V2 + to + the + N + time.

sentences.en1: Have you ever had a stunt in a film?
sentences.en2: Have you ever had a stunt in a film?
sentences.vi: Bạn đã từng làm pha mạo hiểm trong phim chưa? 🎬🤸‍♂️❓
sentences.formula: Have + you + ever + V3 + a + N + in + a + N?

sentences.en1: She has visited London, but she didn't see Big Ben.
sentences.en2: She has visited London, but she didn't see Big Ben.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy đã đến thăm Luân Đôn, nhưng cô ấy không nhìn thấy Big Ben. 🇬🇧🗼❌
sentences.formula: He/She + has + V3 + place, but + he/she + didn't + V + N.

sentences.en1: We have never tried Indian food.
sentences.en2: We have never tried Indian food.
sentences.vi: Chúng tôi chưa bao giờ thử đồ ăn Ấn Độ. 🇮🇳🍛❌
sentences.formula: We + have + never + V3 + adj + N.

sentences.en1: Did you enjoy the pop concert?
sentences.en2: Did you enjoy the pop concert?
sentences.vi: Bạn có thích buổi hòa nhạc pop không? 🎵🎤❓
sentences.formula: Did + you + V + the + N + N?

sentences.en1: I’ve got too many jobs to do.
sentences.en2: I’ve got too many jobs to do.
sentences.vi: Tôi có quá nhiều việc phải làm. 💼📚
sentences.formula: I’ve + got + too many + N(s) + to + V.

sentences.en1: I haven’t got enough time.
sentences.en2: I haven’t got enough time.
sentences.vi: Tôi không có đủ thời gian. ⏰❌
sentences.formula: I + haven’t + got + enough + N.

sentences.en1: There are too many screws here.
sentences.en2: There are too many screws here.
sentences.vi: Có quá nhiều ốc vít ở đây. 🔩
sentences.formula: There + are + too many + N(s) + here.

sentences.en1: We don't have enough tools.
sentences.en2: We don't have enough tools.
sentences.vi: Chúng tôi không có đủ dụng cụ. 🛠️❌
sentences.formula: We + don't + have + enough + N(s).

sentences.en1: He has too many inventions in his mind.
sentences.en2: He has too many inventions in his mind.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy có quá nhiều phát minh trong đầu. 💡🧠
sentences.formula: He/She + has + too many + N(s) + in + his/her + N.

unit: U6.2: Functional questions: Can you tell me what...?

sentences.en1: Can you tell me what this machine is?
sentences.en2: Can you tell me what this machine is?
sentences.vi: Bạn có thể cho tôi biết cái máy này là gì không? ⚙️❓
sentences.formula: Can + you + tell me + what + this + N + is?

sentences.en1: Can you tell me what this button does?
sentences.en2: Can you tell me what this button does?
sentences.vi: Bạn có thể cho tôi biết nút này làm gì không? 🔘❓
sentences.formula: Can + you + tell me + what + this + N + V(s)?

sentences.en1: Can you tell me what the drill is for?
sentences.en2: Can you tell me what the drill is for?
sentences.vi: Bạn có thể cho tôi biết cái máy khoan dùng để làm gì không? 🛠️❓
sentences.formula: Can + you + tell me + what + the + N + is + for?

sentences.en1: Can you tell me who invented this?
sentences.en2: Can you tell me who invented this?
sentences.vi: Bạn có thể cho tôi biết ai đã phát minh ra cái này? 👨🔬💡❓
sentences.formula: Can + you + tell me + who + V3 + this?

sentences.en1: Can you tell me where the hammer is?
sentences.en2: Can you tell me where the hammer is?
sentences.vi: Bạn có thể cho tôi biết cái búa ở đâu không? 🔨📍❓
sentences.formula: Can + you + tell me + where + the + N + is?

sentences.en1: Going on a space trip is exciting!
sentences.en2: Going on a space trip is exciting!
sentences.vi: Đi du hành vũ trụ thật hào hứng! 🚀🌟
sentences.formula: V-ing + on + a + N + N + is + adj!

sentences.en1: Staying up late is really tiring.
sentences.en2: Staying up late is really tiring.
sentences.vi: Thức khuya thực sự mệt mỏi. 🌙😴
sentences.formula: V-ing + up + late + is + really + adj.

sentences.en1: I love watching the stars.
sentences.en2: I love watching the stars.
sentences.vi: Tôi yêu thích ngắm sao. ⭐❤️
sentences.formula: I + love + V-ing + the + N(s).

sentences.en1: Walking on the moon must be amazing.
sentences.en2: Walking on the moon must be amazing.
sentences.vi: Đi bộ trên mặt trăng hẳn là tuyệt vời. 🌕👨🚀
sentences.formula: V-ing + on + the + N + must + be + adj.

sentences.en1: His favourite activity is checking the control panel.
sentences.en2: His favourite activity is checking the control panel.
sentences.vi: Hoạt động yêu thích của anh ấy là kiểm tra bảng điều khiển. 🎛️❤️
sentences.formula: His/Her + adj + N + is + V-ing + the + N.

sentences.en1: He said that he was back from the stars.
sentences.en2: He said that he was back from the stars.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy nói rằng anh ấy đã trở về từ các vì sao. 👨🚀⭐
sentences.formula: He/She + said + that + he/she + was + back + from + the + N(s).

sentences.en1: She told me that the mission was successful.
sentences.en2: She told me that the mission was successful.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy nói với tôi rằng nhiệm vụ đã thành công. 🎯✅
sentences.formula: He/She + told + me + that + the + N + was + adj.

sentences.en1: They said they saw a UFO.
sentences.en2: They said they saw a UFO.
sentences.vi: Họ nói họ đã nhìn thấy một UFO. 🛸👀
sentences.formula: They + said + they + V2 + a + N.

sentences.en1: He told us that Houston called.
sentences.en2: He told us that Houston called.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy nói với chúng tôi rằng Houston đã gọi. 📞🇺🇸
sentences.formula: He/She + told + us + that + place + V2.

sentences.en1: She said she wanted to be an astronaut.
sentences.en2: She said she wanted to be an astronaut.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy nói cô ấy muốn trở thành phi hành gia. 👩🚀🚀
sentences.formula: He/She + said + he/she + wanted to + be + an + N.

sentences.en1: It’s cold at the poles, isn’t it?
sentences.en2: It’s cold at the poles, isn’t it?
sentences.vi: Ở các cực thì lạnh, phải không? 🧊❓
sentences.formula: It + 's + adj + at + the + N(s), + isn't + it?

sentences.en1: And the nights are dark, aren’t they?
sentences.en2: And the nights are dark, aren’t they?
sentences.vi: Và những đêm thì tối, phải không? 🌌❓
sentences.formula: And + the + N(s) + are + adj, + aren't + they?

sentences.en1: You're from the Arctic, aren't you?
sentences.en2: You're from the Arctic, aren't you?
sentences.vi: Bạn đến từ Bắc Cực, phải không? 🧊👤❓
sentences.formula: You + 're + from + the + N, + aren't + you?

sentences.en1: The iceberg is huge, isn't it?
sentences.en2: The iceberg is huge, isn't it?
sentences.vi: Tảng băng trôi thật to lớn, phải không? 🧊🐋❓
sentences.formula: The + N + is + adj, + isn't + it?

sentences.en1: Polar bears are strong, aren't they?
sentences.en2: Polar bears are strong, aren't they?
sentences.vi: Gấu Bắc Cực rất khỏe, phải không? 🐻❄️💪❓
sentences.formula: N(s) + are + adj, + aren't + they?

sentences.en1: The jungle may be in danger.
sentences.en2: The jungle may be in danger.
sentences.vi: Khu rừng có thể gặp nguy hiểm. 🌳⚠️
sentences.formula: The + N + may + be + in + N.

sentences.en1: They might take our home away.
sentences.en2: They might take our home away.
sentences.vi: Họ có thể lấy đi nhà của chúng ta. 🏠👋
sentences.formula: They + might + V + our + N + away.

sentences.en1: We might see the Northern Lights tonight.
sentences.en2: We might see the Northern Lights tonight.
sentences.vi: Chúng ta có thể nhìn thấy Bắc Cực quang tối nay. 🌌✨
sentences.formula: We + might + V + the + N + N + time.

sentences.en1: She may need warmer mittens.
sentences.en2: She may need warmer mittens.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy có thể cần đôi găng tay ấm hơn. 🧤🔥
sentences.formula: He/She + may + V + adj + N(s).

sentences.en1: It might snow tomorrow.
sentences.en2: It might snow tomorrow.
sentences.vi: Ngày mai trời có thể có tuyết. ❄️📅
sentences.formula: It + might + V + tomorrow.

sentences.en1: If I had a time machine, I’d go back to the past.
sentences.en2: If I had a time machine, I’d go back to the past.
sentences.vi: Nếu tôi có một cỗ máy thời gian, tôi sẽ quay về quá khứ. ⏳🚀
sentences.formula: If + I + had + a + N + N, + I'd + V + back + to + the + N.

sentences.en1: If I met a dinosaur, I wouldn’t stop to say ‘hello’.
sentences.en2: If I met a dinosaur, I wouldn’t stop to say ‘hello’.
sentences.vi: Nếu tôi gặp một con khủng long, tôi sẽ không dừng lại để chào. 🦖👋❌
sentences.formula: If + I + V2 + a + N, + I + wouldn't + V + to + V.

sentences.en1: If you saw a T-rex, what would you do?
sentences.en2: If you saw a T-rex, what would you do?
sentences.vi: Nếu bạn nhìn thấy một con T-rex, bạn sẽ làm gì? 🦖❓
sentences.formula: If + you + V2 + a + N, + what + would + you + do?

sentences.en1: I would run quickly if I saw a triceratops.
sentences.en2: I would run quickly if I saw a triceratops.
sentences.vi: Tôi sẽ chạy thật nhanh nếu tôi nhìn thấy một con khủng long ba sừng. 🦕🏃‍♂️
sentences.formula: I + would + V + adv + if + I + V2 + a + N.

sentences.en1: If we lived in the Jurassic Age, life would be different.
sentences.en2: If we lived in the Jurassic Age, life would be different.
sentences.vi: Nếu chúng ta sống ở Kỷ Jura, cuộc sống sẽ khác. 🦕🌿
sentences.formula: If + we + V2 + in + the + N + N, + N + would + be + adj.

sentences.en1: What would you do if you saw a dinosaur?
sentences.en2: What would you do if you saw a dinosaur?
sentences.vi: Bạn sẽ làm gì nếu bạn nhìn thấy một con khủng long? 🦖❓
sentences.formula: What + would + you + do + if + you + V2 + a + N?

sentences.en1: Where would you go if you could travel in time?
sentences.en2: Where would you go if you could travel in time?
sentences.vi: Bạn sẽ đi đâu nếu bạn có thể du hành thời gian? ⏳✈️❓
sentences.formula: Where + would + you + V + if + you + could + V + in + N?

sentences.en1: Would you be scared if a dinosaur chased you?
sentences.en2: Would you be scared if a dinosaur chased you?
sentences.vi: Bạn có sợ hãi không nếu một con khủng long đuổi theo bạn? 🦖🏃‍♂️😨❓
sentences.formula: Would + you + be + adj + if + a + N + V2 + you?

sentences.en1: If you found a dinosaur egg, would you keep it?
sentences.en2: If you found a dinosaur egg, would you keep it?
sentences.vi: Nếu bạn tìm thấy một quả trứng khủng long, bạn có giữ nó không? 🥚🦕❓
sentences.formula: If + you + V2 + a + N + N, + would + you + V + it?

sentences.en1: What would a dinosaur eat if it lived today?
sentences.en2: What would a dinosaur eat if it lived today?
sentences.vi: Một con khủng long sẽ ăn gì nếu nó sống ngày nay? 🦖🍖❓
sentences.formula: What + would + a + N + V + if + it + V2 + today?

unit: 0.1: be, have got (giới thiệu bản thân)

sentences.en1: My nationality is Vietnamese.
sentences.en2: My nationality is Vietnamese.
sentences.vi: Quốc tịch của tôi là Việt Nam. 🇻🇳
sentences.formula: My + nationality + is + country.

sentences.en1: I have got two cousins in Australia.
sentences.en2: I have got two cousins in Australia.
sentences.vi: Tôi có hai người anh em họ ở Úc. 👫🇦🇺
sentences.formula: I + have got + number + N(s) + in + place.

sentences.en1: She has got a big family.
sentences.en2: She has got a big family.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy có một gia đình lớn. 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦
sentences.formula: He/She + has got + a + adj + N.

sentences.en1: What is your address?
sentences.en2: What is your address?
sentences.vi: Địa chỉ của bạn là gì? 🏠
sentences.formula: What + is + your + N?

sentences.en1: This is my grandparent's passport.
sentences.en2: This is my grandparent's passport.
sentences.vi: Đây là hộ chiếu của ông bà tôi. 👵📘
sentences.formula: This + is + my + N's + N.

sentences.en1: My nephew can ride a bike.
sentences.en2: My nephew can ride a bike.
sentences.vi: Cháu trai tôi có thể đi xe đạp. 👦🚲
sentences.formula: My + N + can + V + a + N.

sentences.en1: Can your niece speak English?
sentences.en2: Can your niece speak English?
sentences.vi: Cháu gái của bạn có thể nói tiếng Anh không? 👧🇬🇧❓
sentences.formula: Can + your + N + V + language?

sentences.en1: He lives in London.
sentences.en2: He lives in London.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy sống ở Luân Đôn. 🇬🇧
sentences.formula: He/She + V(s) + in + place.

sentences.en1: She wants an identity card.
sentences.en2: She wants an identity card.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy muốn một chứng minh nhân dân. 🪪
sentences.formula: He/She + V(s) + a/an + N.

sentences.en1: It costs a lot of money.
sentences.en2: It costs a lot of money.
sentences.vi: Nó tốn rất nhiều tiền. 💰
sentences.formula: It + V(s) + a lot of + N.

sentences.en1: I always wake up early.
sentences.en2: I always wake up early.
sentences.vi: Tôi luôn thức dậy sớm. ⏰
sentences.formula: I + adverb of frequency + V + adv.

sentences.en1: A pilot often leaves the house very early.
sentences.en2: A pilot often leaves the house very early.
sentences.vi: Một phi công thường rời nhà rất sớm. ✈️🚪
sentences.formula: A + job + adverb of frequency + V(s) + the + N + very + adv.

sentences.en1: She usually spends time alone at the weekend.
sentences.en2: She usually spends time alone at the weekend.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy thường dành thời gian một mình vào cuối tuần. 🧘📅
sentences.formula: He/She + adverb of frequency + V(s) + N + at + the + N.

sentences.en1: Does a police officer wear a uniform?
sentences.en2: Does a police officer wear a uniform?
sentences.vi: Một cảnh sát có mặc đồng phục không? 👮👔❓
sentences.formula: Does + a + job + V + a + N?

sentences.en1: He doesn't relax at home. He goes shopping.
sentences.en2: He doesn't relax at home. He goes shopping.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy không thư giãn ở nhà. Anh ấy đi mua sắm. 🛋️❌🛍️
sentences.formula: He/She + doesn't + V + at home. He/She + V(s) + N.

sentences.en1: What time do you get dressed?
sentences.en2: What time do you get dressed?
sentences.vi: Bạn mặc quần áo lúc mấy giờ? 👕⏰❓
sentences.formula: What time + do + you + V?

sentences.en1: Where does a mechanic work?
sentences.en2: Where does a mechanic work?
sentences.vi: Một thợ máy làm việc ở đâu? 🔧📍❓
sentences.formula: Where + does + a + job + V?

sentences.en1: Do you like your job?
sentences.en2: Do you like your job?
sentences.vi: Bạn có thích công việc của bạn không? 💼❓
sentences.formula: Do + you + like + your + N?

sentences.en1: Does she work in an office?
sentences.en2: Does she work in an office?
sentences.vi: Cô ấy có làm việc trong văn phòng không? 🏢❓
sentences.formula: Does + he/she + V + in + an + N?

sentences.en1: How do you go to work?
sentences.en2: How do you go to work?
sentences.vi: Bạn đi làm bằng cách nào? 🚗💼❓
sentences.formula: How + do + you + V + to + N?

unit: 2.1: Present Continuous (hành động ngay lúc nói)

sentences.en1: Look! It is snowing in winter!
sentences.en2: Look! It is snowing in winter!

sentences.en1: Do you like being in a bad mood?
sentences.en2: Do you like being in a bad mood?
sentences.vi: Bạn có thích ở trong tâm trạng tồi tệ không? 😠❓
sentences.formula: Do + you + like + V-ing + in + a + adj + N?

sentences.en1: I think it will rain later.
sentences.en2: I think it will rain later.
sentences.vi: Tôi nghĩ trời sẽ mưa sau. 🌧️🔮
sentences.formula: I + think + it + will + V + later.

sentences.en1: She may visit the castle tomorrow.
sentences.en2: She may visit the castle tomorrow.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy có thể sẽ thăm lâu đài vào ngày mai. 🏰📅
sentences.formula: He/She + may + V + the + N + time.

sentences.en1: They might be at the fountain.
sentences.en2: They might be at the fountain.
sentences.vi: Họ có thể đang ở đài phun nước. ⛲📍
sentences.formula: They + might + be + at + the + N.

sentences.en1: The pedestrian will cross at the crossing.
sentences.en2: The pedestrian will cross at the crossing.
sentences.vi: Người đi bộ sẽ băng qua ở vạch sang đường. 🚶‍♂️➡️
sentences.formula: The + N + will + V + at + the + N.

sentences.en1: It might not be crowded at the statue today.
sentences.en2: It might not be crowded at the statue today.
sentences.vi: Có thể không đông đúc ở bức tượng hôm nay. 🗿👥❌
sentences.formula: It + might + not + be + adj + at + the + N + time.

sentences.en1: I will help you find the stadium.
sentences.en2: I will help you find the stadium.
sentences.vi: Tôi sẽ giúp bạn tìm sân vận động. 🏟️🤝
sentences.formula: I + will + V + you + V + the + N.

sentences.en1: Shall we meet at the roundabout?
sentences.en2: Shall we meet at the roundabout?
sentences.vi: Chúng ta gặp nhau ở vòng xuyến nhé? 🚦📍❓
sentences.formula: Shall + we + V + at + the + N?

sentences.en1: He will wait for you near the skyscraper.
sentences.en2: He will wait for you near the skyscraper.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy sẽ đợi bạn gần tòa nhà chọc trời. 🏙️⏳
sentences.formula: He/She + will + V + for + you + near + the + N.

sentences.en1: I promise I will be careful with the traffic lights.
sentences.en2: I promise I will be careful with the traffic lights.
sentences.vi: Tôi hứa tôi sẽ cẩn thận với đèn giao thông. 🚥🤲
sentences.formula: I + promise + I + will + be + adj + with + the + N(s).

sentences.en1: Shall I show you the way to the square?
sentences.en2: Shall I show you the way to the square?
sentences.vi: Tôi chỉ cho bạn đường đến quảng trường nhé? 🛣️🏛️❓
sentences.formula: Shall + I + V + you + the + N + to + the + N?

unit: 11.1: Present Continuous (kế hoạch cố định) & Present Simple (lịch trình)

sentences.en1: I am meeting my friend at the shop at 3 PM.
sentences.en2: I am meeting my friend at the shop at 3 PM.
sentences.vi: Tôi sẽ gặp bạn tôi ở cửa hàng lúc 3 giờ chiều. 🛍️👫3️⃣
sentences.formula: I + am + V-ing + my + N + at + the + N + at + time.

sentences.en1: The train leaves at 10:15.
sentences.en2: The train leaves at 10:15.
sentences.vi: Tàu khởi hành lúc 10:15. 648
sentences.formula: The + N + V(s) + at + time.

sentences.en1: She is buying a new handbag tomorrow.
sentences.en2: She is buying a new handbag tomorrow.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy sẽ mua một chiếc túi xách mới vào ngày mai. 👜🆕📅
sentences.formula: He/She + is + V-ing + a + adj + N + time.

sentences.en1: The shop assistant starts work at nine.
sentences.en2: The shop assistant starts work at nine.
sentences.vi: Nhân viên bán hàng bắt đầu làm việc lúc 9 giờ. 💁⏰
sentences.formula: The + N + V(s) + N + at + time.

sentences.en1: We aren't going to the market on Monday. It's closed.
sentences.en2: We aren't going to the market on Monday. It's closed.
sentences.vi: Chúng tôi sẽ không đi chợ vào thứ Hai. Nó đóng cửa. 🛍️❌📅
sentences.formula: We + aren't + V-ing + to + the + N + on + day. It + 's + adj.

sentences.en1: I am going to pay by credit card.
sentences.en2: I am going to pay by credit card.
sentences.vi: Tôi sẽ thanh toán bằng thẻ tín dụng. 💳
sentences.formula: I + am + going to + V + by + N.

sentences.en1: Are you going to ask for a discount?
sentences.en2: Are you going to ask for a discount?
sentences.vi: Bạn có định yêu cầu giảm giá không? 💰❓
sentences.formula: Are + you + going to + V + for + a + N?

sentences.en1: He is going to waste his salary on games.
sentences.en2: He is going to waste his salary on games.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy sẽ lãng phí lương của mình vào trò chơi. 💵🎮❌
sentences.formula: He/She + is + going to + V + his/her + N + on + N(s).

sentences.en1: Can I try this on in the changing room?
sentences.en2: Can I try this on in the changing room?
sentences.vi: Tôi có thể thử cái này trong phòng thay đồ được không? 🛋️👗❓
sentences.formula: Can + I + V + this + on + in + the + N?

sentences.en1: Remember to keep the receipt.
sentences.en2: Remember to keep the receipt.
sentences.vi: Hãy nhớ giữ hóa đơn. 🧾💾
sentences.formula: V + to + V + the + N.

sentences.en1: If you heat water to 100°C, it boils.
sentences.en2: If you heat water to 100°C, it boils.
sentences.vi: Nếu bạn đun nước đến 100°C, nó sôi. 💧🔥
sentences.formula: If + you + V + N + to + temp, + it + V(s).

sentences.en1: If I pass my exams, I will get a diploma.
sentences.en2: If I pass my exams, I will get a diploma.
sentences.vi: Nếu tôi vượt qua các kỳ thi, tôi sẽ nhận được bằng tốt nghiệp. 📜🎓
sentences.formula: If + I + V + my + N(s), + I + will + V + a + N.

sentences.en1: If she studies hard, she gets good grades.
sentences.en2: If she studies hard, she gets good grades.
sentences.vi: Nếu cô ấy học chăm chỉ, cô ấy nhận được điểm tốt. 📚⭐
sentences.formula: If + he/she + V(s) + adv, + he/she + V(s) + adj + N(s).

sentences.en1: If we don't hurry, we will miss the bus.
sentences.en2: If we don't hurry, we will miss the bus.
sentences.vi: Nếu chúng ta không nhanh lên, chúng ta sẽ lỡ xe buýt. 🚌❌
sentences.formula: If + we + don't + V, + we + will + V + the + N.

sentences.en1: If the experiment is dangerous, wear goggles.
sentences.en2: If the experiment is dangerous, wear goggles.
sentences.vi: Nếu thí nghiệm nguy hiểm, hãy đeo kính bảo hộ. 🧪🥽
sentences.formula: If + the + N + is + adj, + V (imperative) + N(s).

sentences.en1: Biology is taught in this classroom.
sentences.en2: Biology is taught in this classroom.
sentences.vi: Sinh học được dạy trong lớp học này. 🧬🏫
sentences.formula: N + is + V3 + in + this + N.

sentences.en1: CVs are checked by the boss.
sentences.en2: CVs are checked by the boss.
sentences.vi: CV được kiểm tra bởi sếp. 📄👨💼
sentences.formula: N(s) + are + V3 + by + the + N.

sentences.en1: The staff are paid every month.
sentences.en2: The staff are paid every month.
sentences.vi: Nhân viên được trả lương mỗi tháng. 👥💰🗓️
sentences.formula: The + N + are + V3 + every + N.

sentences.en1: Is Physics studied in Year 7?
sentences.en2: Is Physics studied in Year 7?
sentences.vi: Vật lý có được học ở Năm 7 không? ⚛️7️⃣❓
sentences.formula: Is + N + V3 + in + Year + number?

sentences.en1: Qualifications are not given easily.
sentences.en2: Qualifications are not given easily.
sentences.vi: Bằng cấp không được trao một cách dễ dàng. 📜🎓❌
sentences.formula: N(s) + are + not + V3 + adv.

sentences.en1: My brother is taller than me.
sentences.en2: My brother is taller than me.
sentences.vi: Anh trai tôi cao hơn tôi. 👦📏
sentences.formula: My + N + is + adj-er + than + me.

sentences.en1: This handbag is more expensive than that one.
sentences.en2: This handbag is more expensive than that one.
sentences.vi: Chiếc túi xách này đắt hơn chiếc kia. 👜💰
sentences.formula: This + N + is + more + adj + than + that + one.

sentences.en1: She is kinder than her friend.
sentences.en2: She is kinder than her friend.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy tử tế hơn bạn của cô ấy. 🤗👫
sentences.formula: He/She + is + adj-er + than + his/her + N.

sentences.en1: Is driving a car more difficult than riding a bike?
sentences.en2: Is driving a car more difficult than riding a bike?
sentences.vi: Lái xe ô tô có khó hơn đi xe đạp không? 🚗🚲❓
sentences.formula: Is + V-ing + a + N + more + adj + than + V-ing + a + N?

sentences.en1: He is less serious than he looks.
sentences.en2: He is less serious than he looks.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy ít nghiêm túc hơn vẻ ngoài của anh ấy. 🧐👦
sentences.formula: He/She + is + less + adj + than + he/she + V(s).

sentences.en1: He is the most brilliant student in the class.
sentences.en2: He is the most brilliant student in the class.
sentences.vi: Anh ấy là học sinh thông minh nhất trong lớp. 🧠🌟🏫
sentences.formula: He/She + is + the + most + adj + N + in + the + N.

sentences.en1: These are the most fashionable trainers.
sentences.en2: These are the most fashionable trainers.
sentences.vi: Đây là những đôi giày thể thao hợp thời trang nhất. 👟👗
sentences.formula: These + are + the + most + adj + N(s).

sentences.en1: She is not as sociable as her sister.
sentences.en2: She is not as sociable as her sister.
sentences.vi: Cô ấy không hòa đồng như chị gái của cô ấy. 😊👧❌
sentences.formula: He/She + is + not + as + adj + as + his/her + N.

sentences.en1: Is this jewellery as expensive as it looks?
sentences.en2: Is this jewellery as expensive as it looks?
sentences.vi: Món trang sức này có đắt như vẻ ngoài của nó không? 💎💰❓
sentences.formula: Is + this + N + as + adj + as + it + V(s)?

sentences.en1: Yesterday was the hottest day of the year.
sentences.en2: Yesterday was the hottest day of the year.
sentences.vi: Hôm qua là ngày nóng nhất trong năm. 🌡️📅
sentences.formula: Time + was + the + adj-est + N + of + the + N.

unit: 14.1: Modals: can, must, have to, need to

sentences.en1: You must wear a helmet for rugby.
sentences.en2: You must wear a helmet for rugby.
sentences.vi: Bạn phải đội mũ bảo hiểm để chơi bóng bầu dục. 🏉⛑️
sentences.formula: You + must + V + a + N + for + N.

sentences.en1: Players have to follow the referee's decision.
sentences.en2: Players have to follow the referee's decision.
sentences.vi: Các cầu thủ phải tuân theo quyết định của trọng tài. 👨‍⚖️✅
sentences.formula: N(s) + have to + V + the + N's + N.

sentences.en1: You can score a goal by kicking the ball into the net.
sentences.en2: You can score a goal by kicking the ball into the net.
sentences.vi: Bạn có thể ghi bàn bằng cách đá bóng vào lưới. ⚽🥅
sentences.formula: You + can + V + a + N + by + V-ing + the + N + into + the + N.

sentences.en1: Do I need to bring my own racket for tennis?
sentences.en2: Do I need to bring my own racket for tennis?
sentences.vi: Tôi có cần mang vợt riêng để chơi quần vợt không? 🎾❓
sentences.formula: Do + I + need to + V + my + own + N + for + N?

sentences.en1: We don't have to win every match.
sentences.en2: We don't have to win every match.
sentences.vi: Chúng tôi không phải thắng mọi trận đấu. 🤼❌
sentences.formula: We + don't + have to + V + every + N.

sentences.en1: I usually play football on the pitch.
sentences.en2: I usually play football on the pitch.
sentences.vi: Tôi thường chơi bóng đá trên sân cỏ. ⚽🏟️
sentences.formula: I + adverb of frequency + V + N + on + the + N.

sentences.en1: I am watching the tournament now.
sentences.en2: I am watching the tournament now.
sentences.vi: Tôi đang xem giải đấu bây giờ. 🏆👀
sentences.formula: I + am + V-ing + the + N + now.

sentences.en1: I watched the athletics competition yesterday.
sentences.en2: I watched the athletics competition yesterday.
sentences.vi: Tôi đã xem cuộc thi điền kinh ngày hôm qua. 🏃‍♂️📅
sentences.formula: I + V2 + the + N + N + time.

sentences.en1: I have never tried archery.
sentences.en2: I have never tried archery.
sentences.vi: Tôi chưa bao giờ thử bắn cung. 🏹❌
sentences.formula: I + have + never + V3 + N.

sentences.en1: I will go to the stadium afterwards.
sentences.en2: I will go to the stadium afterwards.
sentences.vi: Tôi sẽ đến sân vận động sau đó. 🏟️⏭️
sentences.formula: I + will + V + to + the + N + afterwards.
